items.title: Performance-aware Scale Analysis with Reserve for Homomorphic Encryption.
items.abstract:
Thanks to the computation ability on encrypted data and the efficient fixed-point execution, the RNS-CKKS fully homo-morphic encryption (FHE) scheme is a promising solution for privacy-preserving machine learning services. However, writing an efficient RNS-CKKS program is challenging due to its manual scale management requirement. Each cipher-text has a scale value with its maximum scale capacity. Since each RNS-CKKS multiplication increases the scale, programmers should properly rescale a ciphertext by reducing the scale and capacity together. Existing compilers reduce the programming burden by automatically analyzing and managing the scales of ciphertexts, but they either conservatively rescale ciphertexts and thus give up further optimization opportunities, or require time-consuming scale management space exploration.

This work proposes a new performance-aware static scale analysis for an RNS-CKKS program, which generates an efficient scale management plan without expensive space exploration. This work analyzes the scale budget, called "reserve", of each ciphertext in a backward manner from the end of a program and redistributes the budgets to the cipher-texts, thus enabling performance-aware scale management. This work also designs a new type system for the proposed scale analysis and ensures the correctness of the analysis result. This work achieves 41.8% performance improvement over EVA that uses conservative static scale analysis. It also shows similar performance improvement to exploration-based Hecate yet with 15526× faster scale management time.
items.abstract_zh:
得益于加密数据的计算能力和高效的定点执行，RNS-CKKS 全同态加密（FHE）方案是隐私保护机器学习服务的一种有前景的解决方案。然而，由于其手动规模管理要求，编写高效的 RNS-CKKS 程序具有挑战性。每个密文都有一个尺度值及其最大尺度容量。由于每次 RNS-CKKS 乘法都会增加规模，因此程序员应通过同时减少规模和容量来正确重新调整密文的规模。现有的编译器通过自动分析和管理密文的规模来减轻编程负担，但它们要么保守地重新调整密文从而放弃进一步的优化机会，要么需要耗时的规模管理空间探索。

这项工作为 RNS-CKKS 程序提出了一种新的性能感知静态规模分析，它可以生成有效的规模管理计划，而无需昂贵的空间探索。这项工作从程序结束时以向后的方式分析每个密文的规模预算（称为“储备”），并将预算重新分配给密文，从而实现性能感知的规模管理。本工作还为所提出的尺度分析设计了一种新型系统，并确保了分析结果的正确性。与使用保守静态尺度分析的 EVA 相比，这项工作实现了 41.8% 的性能提升。它还显示出与基于探索的 Hecate 类似的性能改进，但规模管理时间快了 15526 倍。

items.title: Proteus: A High-Throughput Inference-Serving System with Accuracy Scaling.
items.abstract: Existing machine learning inference-serving systems largely rely on hardware scaling by adding more devices or using more powerful accelerators to handle increasing query demands. However, hardware scaling might not be feasible for fixed-size edge clusters or private clouds due to their limited hardware resources. A viable alternate solution is accuracy scaling, which adapts the accuracy of ML models instead of hardware resources to handle varying query demands. This work studies the design of a high-throughput inference-serving system with accuracy scaling that can meet throughput requirements while maximizing accuracy. To achieve the goal, this work proposes to identify the right amount of accuracy scaling by jointly optimizing three sub-problems: how to select model variants, how to place them on heterogeneous devices, and how to assign query workloads to each device. It also proposes a new adaptive batching algorithm to handle variations in query arrival times and minimize SLO violations. Based on the proposed techniques, we build an inference-serving system called Proteus and empirically evaluate it on real-world and synthetic traces. We show that Proteus reduces accuracy drop by up to 3× and latency timeouts by 2--10× with respect to baseline schemes, while meeting throughput requirements.
items.abstract_zh: 现有的机器学习推理服务系统在很大程度上依赖于硬件扩展，通过添加更多设备或使用更强大的加速器来处理不断增长的查询需求。然而，由于硬件资源有限，硬件扩展对于固定大小的边缘集群或私有云可能不可行。一个可行的替代解决方案是精度扩展，它调整 ML 模型的精度而不是硬件资源来处理不同的查询需求。这项工作研究了具有精度扩展的高吞吐量推理服务系统的设计，该系统可以满足吞吐量要求，同时最大限度地提高精度。为了实现这一目标，这项工作建议通过联合优化三个子问题来确定适当的精度缩放量：如何选择模型变体、如何将它们放置在异构设备上以及如何将查询工作负载分配给每个设备。它还提出了一种新的自适应批处理算法来处理查询到达时间的变化并最大限度地减少 SLO 违规。基于所提出的技术，我们构建了一个名为 Proteus 的推理服务系统，并根据现实世界和合成痕迹对其进行实证评估。我们表明，相对于基线方案，Proteus 可以将准确率下降多达 3 倍，并将延迟超时降低 2--10 倍，同时满足吞吐量要求。

items.title: EagleEye: Nanosatellite constellation design for high-coverage, high-resolution sensing.
items.abstract: Advances in nanosatellite technology and low launch costs have led to more Earth-observation satellites in low-Earth orbit. Prior work shows that satellite images are useful for geospatial analysis applications (e.g., ship detection, lake monitoring, and oil tank volume estimation). To maximize its value, a satellite constellation should achieve high coverage and provide high-resolution images of the targets. Existing homogeneous constellation designs cannot meet both requirements: a constellation with low-resolution cameras provides high coverage but only delivers low-resolution images; a constellation with high-resolution cameras images smaller geographic areas. We develop EagleEye, a novel mixed-resolution, leader-follower constellation design. The leader satellite has a low-resolution, high-coverage camera to detect targets with onboard image processing. The follower satellite(s), equipped with a high-resolution camera, receive commands from the leader and take high-resolution images of the targets. The leader must consider actuation time constraints when scheduling follower target acquisitions. Additionally, the leader must complete both target detection and follower scheduling in a limited time. We propose an ILP-based algorithm to schedule follower satellite target acquisition, based on positions identified by a leader satellite. We evaluate on four datasets and show that Eagle-Eye achieves 11--194% more coverage compared to existing solutions.
items.abstract_zh: 纳米卫星技术的进步和较低的发射成本导致更多的地球观测卫星进入近地轨道。先前的工作表明，卫星图像可用于地理空间分析应用（例如船舶检测、湖泊监测和油罐体积估计）。为了最大限度地发挥其价值，卫星星座应实现高覆盖范围并提供目标的高分辨率图像。现有的同构星座设计无法同时满足这两个要求：低分辨率相机的星座可以提供高覆盖范围，但只能提供低分辨率图像；具有高分辨率相机的星座可以拍摄较小的地理区域。我们开发了 EagleEye，这是一种新颖的混合分辨率、领导者-跟随者星座设计。领先卫星拥有低分辨率、高覆盖范围的相机，可通过机载图像处理来检测目标。跟随卫星配备高分辨率相机，接收主卫星的命令并拍摄目标的高分辨率图像。领导者在安排追随者目标获取时必须考虑驱动时间限制。此外，领导者必须在有限的时间内完成目标检测和跟随者调度。我们提出了一种基于 ILP 的算法，根据引导卫星确定的位置来安排跟随卫星目标捕获。我们对四个数据集进行评估，结果表明，与现有解决方案相比，Eagle-Eye 的覆盖范围提高了 11--194%。

items.title: ZENO: A Type-based Optimization Framework for Zero Knowledge Neural Network Inference.
items.abstract: Zero knowledge Neural Networks draw increasing attention for guaranteeing computation integrity and privacy of neural networks (NNs) based on zero-knowledge Succinct Non-interactive ARgument of Knowledge (zkSNARK) security scheme. However, the performance of zkSNARK NNs is far from optimal due to the million-scale circuit computation with heavy scalar-level dependency. In this paper, we propose a type-based optimizing framework for efficient zero-knowledge NN inference, namely ZENO (ZEro knowledge Neural network Optimizer). We first introduce ZENO language construct to maintain high-level semantics and the type information (e.g. , privacy and tensor) for allowing more aggressive optimizations. We then propose privacy-type driven and tensor-type driven optimizations to further optimize the generated zkSNARK circuit. Finally, we design a set of NN-centric system optimizations to further accelerate zkSNARK NNs. Experimental results show that ZENO achieves up to 8.5× end-to-end speedup than state-of-the-art zkSNARK NNs. We reduce proof time for VGG16 from 6 minutes to 48 seconds, which makes zkSNARK NNs practical.
items.abstract_zh: 零知识神经网络因保证基于零知识简洁非交互式知识论证（zkSNARK）安全方案的神经网络（NN）的计算完整性和隐私性而受到越来越多的关注。然而，由于百万级电路计算具有严重的标量级依赖性，zkSNARK 神经网络的性能远非最佳。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于高效零知识神经网络推理的基于类型的优化框架，即ZENO（零知识神经网络优化器）。我们首先引入 ZENO 语言结构来维护高级语义和类型信息（例如，隐私和张量），以允许更积极的优化。然后，我们提出隐私类型驱动和张量类型驱动的优化，以进一步优化生成的 zkSNARK 电路。最后，我们设计了一组以 NN 为中心的系统优化，以进一步加速 zkSNARK NN。实验结果表明，ZENO 比最先进的 zkSNARK 神经网络实现了高达 8.5 倍的端到端加速。我们将 VGG16 的证明时间从 6 分钟减少到 48 秒，这使得 zkSNARK NN 变得实用。

items.title: CrossPrefetch: Accelerating I/O Prefetching for Modern Storage.
items.abstract:
We introduce CrossPrefetch , a novel cross-layered I/O prefetching mechanism that operates across the OS and a user-level runtime to achieve optimal performance. Existing OS prefetching mechanisms suffer from rigid interfaces that do not provide information to applications on the prefetch effectiveness, suffer from high concurrency bottlenecks, and are inefficient in utilizing available system memory. CrossPrefetch addresses these limitations by dividing responsibilities between the OS and runtime, minimizing overhead, and achieving low cache misses, lock contentions, and higher I/O performance.

CrossPrefetch tackles the limitations of rigid OS prefetching interfaces by maintaining and exporting cache state and prefetch effectiveness to user-level runtimes. It also addresses scalability and concurrency bottlenecks by distinguishing between regular I/O and prefetch operations paths and introduces fine-grained prefetch indexing for shared files. Finally, CrossPrefetch designs low-interference access pattern prediction combined with support for adaptive and aggressive techniques to exploit memory capacity and storage bandwidth. Our evaluation of CrossPrefetch, encompassing microbenchmarks, macrobenchmarks, and real-world workloads, illustrates performance gains of up to 1.22x-3.7x in I/O throughput. We also evaluate CrossPrefetch across different file systems and local and remote storage configurations.
items.abstract_zh:
我们引入 CrossPrefetch，这是一种新颖的跨层 I/O 预取机制，可以跨操作系统和用户级运行时运行以实现最佳性能。现有的操作系​​统预取机制存在僵化的接口，无法向应用程序提供有关预取有效性的信息，存在高并发瓶颈，并且在利用可用系统内存方面效率低下。 CrossPrefetch 通过在操作系统和运行时之间划分职责、最小化开销并实现低缓存未命中、锁争用和更高的 I/O 性能来解决这些限制。

CrossPrefetch 通过维护缓存状态和预取有效性并将其导出到用户级运行时来解决严格的操作系统预取接口的局限性。它还通过区分常规 I/O 和预取操作路径来解决可扩展性和并发瓶颈，并为共享文件引入细粒度的预取索引。最后，CrossPrefetch 设计了低干扰访问模式预测，并结合了对自适应和主动技术的支持，以利用内存容量和存储带宽。我们对 CrossPrefetch 的评估（包括微基准测试、宏基准测试和实际工作负载）表明 I/O 吞吐量的性能提升高达 1.22 倍至 3.7 倍。我们还跨不同文件系统以及本地和远程存储配置评估 CrossPrefetch。

items.title: ngAP: Non-blocking Large-scale Automata Processing on GPUs.
items.abstract: Finite automata serve as compute kernels for various applications that require high throughput. However, despite the increasing compute power of GPUs, their potential in processing automata remains underutilized. In this work, we identify three major challenges that limit GPU throughput. 1) The available parallelism is insufficient, resulting in underutilized GPU threads. 2) Automata workloads involve significant redundant computations since a portion of states matches with repeated symbols. 3) The mapping between threads and states is switched dynamically, leading to poor data locality. Our key insight is that processing automata "one-symbol-at-a-time" serializes the execution, and thus needs to be revamped. To address these challenges, we propose Non-blocking Automata Processing, which allows parallel processing of different symbols in the input stream and also enables further optimizations: 1) We prefetch a portion of computations to increase the chances of processing multiple symbols simultaneously, thereby utilizing GPU threads better. 2) To reduce redundant computations, we store repeated computations in a memoization table, enabling us to substitute them with table lookups. 3) We privatize some computations to preserve the mapping between threads and states, thus improving data locality. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art GPU automata processing engine by an average of 7.9× and up to 901× across 20 applications.
items.abstract_zh: 有限自动机充当需要高吞吐量的各种应用程序的计算内核。然而，尽管 GPU 的计算能力不断增强，但它们在处理自动机方面的潜力仍未得到充分利用。在这项工作中，我们确定了限制 GPU 吞吐量的三个主要挑战。 1）可用并行度不足，导致GPU线程利用率不足。 2) 自动机工作负载涉及大量冗余计算，因为部分状态与重复符号匹配。 3）线程和状态之间的映射是动态切换的，导致数据局部性较差。我们的主要见解是，处理自动机“一次一个符号”序列化执行，因此需要进行改进。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了非阻塞自动机处理，它允许并行处理输入流中的不同符号，并且还可以进一步优化：1）我们预取一部分计算以增加同时处理多个符号的机会，从而更好地利用 GPU 线程。 2）为了减少冗余计算，我们将重复的计算存储在记忆表中，使我们能够用表查找来代替它们。 3）我们将一些计算私有化以保留线程和状态之间的映射，从而提高数据局部性。实验结果表明，我们的方法在 20 个应用程序中的性能比最先进的 GPU 自动机处理引擎平均高出 7.9 倍，最高可达 901 倍。

items.title: Amanda: Unified Instrumentation Framework for Deep Neural Networks.
items.abstract: The success of deep neural networks (DNNs) has sparked efforts to analyze (e.g., tracing) and optimize (e.g., pruning) them. These tasks have specific requirements and ad-hoc implementations in current execution backends like TensorFlow/PyTorch, which require developers to manage fragmented interfaces and adapt their codes to diverse models. In this study, we propose a new framework called Amanda to streamline the development of these tasks. We formalize the implementation of these tasks as neural network instrumentation , which involves introducing instrumentation into the operator level of DNNs. This allows us to abstract DNN analysis and optimization tasks as instrumentation tools on various DNN models. We build Amanda with two levels of APIs to achieve a unified, extensible, and efficient instrumentation design. The user-level API provides a unified operator-grained instrumentation API for different backends. Meanwhile, internally, we design a set of callback-centric APIs for managing and optimizing the execution of original and instrumentation codes in different backends. Through these design principles, the Amanda framework can accommodate a broad spectrum of use cases, such as tracing, profiling, pruning, and quantization, across different backends (e.g., TensorFlow/PyTorch) and execution modes (graph/eager mode). Moreover, our efficient execution management ensures that the performance overhead is typically kept within 5%.
items.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 的成功引发了对其进行分析（例如追踪）和优化（例如修剪）的努力。这些任务在当前的执行后端（如 TensorFlow/PyTorch）中具有特定的要求和临时实现，这要求开发人员管理碎片化的接口并使代码适应不同的模型。在这项研究中，我们提出了一个名为 Amanda 的新框架来简化这些任务的开发。我们将这些任务的实现形式化为神经网络仪器，其中涉及将仪器引入 DNN 的操作员级别。这使我们能够将 DNN 分析和优化任务抽象为各种 DNN 模型上的检测工具。我们构建了具有两级 API 的 Amanda，以实现统一、可扩展且高效的仪器设计。用户级API为不同后端提供统一的算子粒度的仪表API。同时，在内部，我们设计了一组以回调为中心的API，用于管理和优化不同后端中原始代码和检测代码的执行。通过这些设计原则，Amanda 框架可以适应广泛的用例，例如跨不同后端（例如 TensorFlow/PyTorch）和执行模式（图形/渴望模式）的跟踪、分析、修剪和量化。此外，我们高效的执行管理可确保性能开销通常保持在 5% 以内。

items.title: GPU-based Private Information Retrieval for On-Device Machine Learning Inference.
items.abstract: On-device machine learning (ML) inference can enable the use of private user data on user devices without revealing them to remote servers. However, a pure on-device solution to private ML inference is impractical for many applications that rely on embedding tables that are too large to be stored on-device. In particular, recommendation models typically use multiple embedding tables each on the order of 1--10 GBs of data, making them impractical to store on-device. To overcome this barrier, we propose the use of private information retrieval (PIR) to efficiently and privately retrieve embeddings from servers without sharing any private information. As off-the-shelf PIR algorithms are usually too computationally intensive to directly use for latency-sensitive inference tasks, we 1) propose novel GPU-based acceleration of PIR, and 2) co-design PIR with the downstream ML application to obtain further speedup. Our GPU acceleration strategy improves system throughput by more than 20× over an optimized CPU PIR implementation, and our PIR-ML co-design provides an over 5× additional throughput improvement at fixed model quality. Together, for various on-device ML applications such as recommendation and language modeling, our system on a single V100 GPU can serve up to 100,000 queries per second---a > 100× throughput improvement over a CPU-based baseline---while maintaining model accuracy.
items.abstract_zh: 设备上机器学习 (ML) 推理可以在用户设备上使用私有用户数据，而无需将其泄露给远程服务器。然而，对于许多依赖于太大而无法存储在设备上的嵌入表的应用程序来说，针对私有 ML 推理的纯设备上解决方案是不切实际的。特别是，推荐模型通常使用多个嵌入表，每个嵌入表的数据量约为 1--10 GB，这使得它们在设备上存储不切实际。为了克服这一障碍，我们建议使用私有信息检索（PIR）来高效、私密地从服务器检索嵌入，而无需共享任何私有信息。由于现成的 PIR 算法通常计算量太大，无法直接用于延迟敏感的推理任务，因此我们 1) 提出基于 GPU 的新型 PIR 加速，2) 与下游 ML 应用程序共同设计 PIR，以获得进一步的加速。与优化的 CPU PIR 实现相比，我们的 GPU 加速策略将系统吞吐量提高了 20 倍以上，而我们的 PIR-ML 协同设计在固定模型质量下将吞吐量提高了 5 倍以上。总之，对于推荐和语言建模等各种设备上的 ML 应用程序，我们的系统在单个 V100 GPU 上每秒可处理多达 100,000 个查询，与基于 CPU 的基准相比吞吐量提高了 100 倍以上，同时保持模型准确性。

items.title: Loupe: Driving the Development of OS Compatibility Layers.
items.abstract:
Supporting mainstream applications is fundamental for a new OS to have impact. It is generally achieved by developing a layer of compatibility allowing applications developed for a mainstream OS like Linux to run unmodified on the new OS. Building such a layer, as we show, results in large engineering inefficiencies due to the lack of efficient methods to precisely measure the OS features required by a set of applications.

We propose Loupe, a novel method based on dynamic analysis that determines the OS features that need to be implemented in a prototype OS to bring support for a target set of applications and workloads. Loupe guides and boosts OS developers as they build compatibility layers, prioritizing which features to implement in order to quickly support many applications as early as possible. We apply our methodology to 100+ applications and several OSes currently under development, demonstrating high engineering effort savings vs. existing approaches: for example, for the 62 applications supported by the OSv kernel, we show that using Loupe, would have required implementing only 37 system calls vs. 92 for the non-systematic process followed by OSv developers.

We study our measurements and extract novel key insights. Overall, we show that the burden of building compatibility layers is significantly less than what previous works suggest: in some cases, only as few as 20% of system calls reported by static analysis, and 50% of those reported by naive dynamic analysis need an implementation for an application to successfully run standard benchmarks.
items.abstract_zh:
支持主流应用程序是新操作系统产生影响的基础。它通常是通过开发一个兼容性层来实现的，允许为 Linux 等主流操作系统开发的应用程序无需修改即可在新操作系统上运行。正如我们所展示的，由于缺乏有效的方法来精确测量一组应用程序所需的操作系统功能，构建这样的层会导致工程效率大幅降低。

我们提出了 Loupe，一种基于动态分析的新颖方法，它确定需要在原型操作系统中实现的操作系统功能，以支持一组目标应用程序和工作负载。 Loupe 在操作系统开发人员构建兼容性层时为他们提供指导和帮助，确定要实现的功能的优先级，以便尽早快速支持许多应用程序。我们将我们的方法应用于目前正在开发的 100 多个应用程序和多个操作系统，与现有方法相比，证明了工程工作量的节省：例如，对于 OSv 内核支持的 62 个应用程序，我们表明使用 Loupe 只需实现 37 个系统调用，而 OSv 开发人员遵循的非系统过程则需要实现 92 个系统调用。

我们研究我们的测量结果并提取新颖的关键见解。总体而言，我们表明构建兼容性层的负担明显低于以前的工作所建议的：在某些情况下，静态分析报告的系统调用只有 20%，而朴素动态分析报告的系统调用中有 50% 需要实现应用程序才能成功运行标准基准测试。

items.title: UBFuzz: Finding Bugs in Sanitizer Implementations.
items.abstract:
In this paper, we propose a testing framework for validating sanitizer implementations in compilers. Our core components are (1) a program generator specifically designed for producing programs containing undefined behavior (UB), and (2) a novel test oracle for sanitizer testing. The program generator employs Shadow Statement Insertion, a general and effective approach for introducing UB into a valid seed program. The generated UB programs are subsequently utilized for differential testing of multiple sanitizer implementations. Nevertheless, discrepant sanitizer reports may stem from either compiler optimization or sanitizer bugs. To accurately determine if a discrepancy is caused by sanitizer bugs, we introduce a new test oracle called crash-site mapping.

We have incorporated our techniques into UBfuzz, a practical tool for testing sanitizers. Over a five-month testing period, UBfuzz successfully found 31 bugs in both GCC and LLVM sanitizers. These bugs reveal the serious false negative problems in sanitizers, where certain UBs in programs went unreported. This research paves the way for further investigation in this crucial area of study.
items.abstract_zh:
在本文中，我们提出了一个用于验证编译器中消毒剂实现的测试框架。我们的核心组件是（1）一个程序生成器，专门用于生成包含未定义行为（UB）的程序，以及（2）一个用于消毒剂测试的新颖的测试预言机。程序生成器采用影子语句插入，这是一种将 UB 引入有效种子程序的通用且有效的方法。生成的 UB 程序随后用于多种消毒剂实施的差异测试。然而，不一致的清理程序报告可能源于编译器优化或清理程序错误。为了准确确定差异是否是由清理程序错误引起的，我们引入了一种称为崩溃站点映射的新测试预言机。

我们已将我们的技术融入到 UBfuzz 中，这是一个用于测试消毒剂的实用工具。经过五个月的测试，UBfuzz 成功在 GCC 和 LLVM 清理程序中发现了 31 个错误。这些错误揭示了消毒剂中严重的假阴性问题，即程序中的某些 UB 未报告。这项研究为这一关键研究领域的进一步研究铺平了道路。

items.title: SoD2: Statically Optimizing Dynamic Deep Neural Network Execution.
items.abstract: Though many compilation and runtime systems have been developed for DNNs in recent years, the focus has largely been on static DNNs. Dynamic DNNs, where tensor shapes and sizes and even the set of operators used are dependent upon the input and/or execution, are becoming common. This paper presents SoD 2 , a comprehensive framework for optimizing Dynamic DNNs. The basis of our approach is a classification of common operators that form DNNs, and the use of this classification towards a Rank and Dimension Propagation (RDP) method. This framework statically determines the shapes of operators as known constants, symbolic constants, or operations on these. Next, using RDP we enable a series of optimizations, like fused code generation, execution (order) planning, and even runtime memory allocation plan generation. By evaluating the framework on 10 emerging Dynamic DNNs and comparing it against several existing systems, we demonstrate both reductions in execution latency and memory requirements, with RDP-enabled key optimizations responsible for much of the gains. Our evaluation results show that SoD 2 runs up to 3.9× faster than these systems while saving up to 88% peak memory consumption.
items.abstract_zh: 尽管近年来已经为 DNN 开发了许多编译和运行时系统，但焦点主要集中在静态 DNN 上。动态 DNN 正在变得越来越普遍，其中张量的形状和大小，甚至所使用的运算符集都取决于输入和/或执行。本文提出了 SoD 2，一个用于优化动态 DNN 的综合框架。我们方法的基础是对形成 DNN 的常见算子进行分类，并将该分类用于秩和维传播 (RDP) 方法。该框架静态地将运算符的形状确定为已知常量、符号常量或对它们的运算。接下来，使用 RDP，我们实现了一系列优化，例如融合代码生成、执行（顺序）规划，甚至运行时内存分配计划生成。通过在 10 个新兴动态 DNN 上评估该框架并将其与多个现有系统进行比较，我们证明了执行延迟和内存需求的减少，而支持 RDP 的关键优化带来了大部分收益。我们的评估结果表明，SoD 2 的运行速度比这些系统快 3.9 倍，同时节省高达 88% 的峰值内存消耗。

items.title: Expanding Datacenter Capacity with DVFS Boosting: A safe and scalable deployment experience.
items.abstract:
COVID-19 pandemic created unexpected demand for our physical infrastructure. We increased our computing supply by growing our infrastructure footprint as well as expanded existing capacity by using various techniques among those DVFS boosting. This paper describes our experience in deploying DVFS boosting to expand capacity.

There are several challenges in deploying DVFS boosting at scale. First, frequency scaling incurs additional power demand, which can exacerbate power over-subscription and incur unexpected capacity loss for the services due to power capping. Second, heterogeneity is commonplace in any large scale infrastructure. We need to deal with the service and hardware heterogeneity to determine the optimal setting for each service and hardware type. Third, there exists a long tail of services with scarce resources and support for performance evaluation. Finally and most importantly, we need to ensure that large scale changes to CPU frequency do not risk the reliability of the services and the infrastructure.

We present our solution that has overcome the above challenges and has been running in production for over 3 years. It created 12 MW of supply which is equivalent to building and populating half a datacenter in our fleet. In addition to the real world performance of our solution, we also share our key takeaways to improve fleetwide efficiency via DVFS boosting in a safe manner.
items.abstract_zh:
COVID-19 大流行对我们的实体基础设施产生了意想不到的需求。我们通过扩大基础设施覆盖范围来增加计算供应，并通过使用 DVFS 提升中的各种技术来扩大现有容量。本文介绍了我们部署 DVFS boosting 来扩展容量的经验。

大规模部署 DVFS boosting 存在一些挑战。首先，频率缩放会产生额外的电力需求，这可能会加剧电力超额认购，并因电力上限而导致服务意外容量损失。其次，异构性在任何大规模基础设施中都很常见。我们需要处理服务和硬件的异构性，以确定每种服务和硬件类型的最佳设置。三是服务长尾，绩效评价资源和支撑稀缺。最后也是最重要的是，我们需要确保 CPU 频率的大规模更改不会危及服务和基础设施的可靠性。

我们提出的解决方案克服了上述挑战，并已在生产中运行了 3 年多。它创造了 12 兆瓦的供电量，相当于在我们的机群中建造和填充半个数据中心。除了我们解决方案的实际性能外，我们还分享了通过安全方式提升 DVFS 来提高整个车队效率的关键要点。

items.title: Scaling Up Memory Disaggregated Applications with SMART.
items.abstract:
Recent developments in RDMA networks are leading to the trend of memory disaggregation. However, the performance of each compute node is still limited by the network, especially when it needs to perform a large number of concurrent fine-grained remote accesses. According to our evaluations, existing IOPS-bound disaggregated applications do not scale well beyond 32 cores, and therefore do not take full advantage of today's many-core machines.

After an in-depth analysis of the internal architecture of RNIC, we found three major scale-up bottlenecks that limit the throughput of today's disaggregated applications: (1) implicit contention of doorbell registers, (2) cache trashing caused by excessive outstanding work requests, and (3) wasted IOPS from unsuccessful CAS retries. However, the solutions to these problems involve many low-level details that are not familiar to application developers. To ease the burden on developers, we propose Smart, an RDMA programming framework that hides the above details by providing an interface similar to one-sided RDMA verbs.

We take 44 and 16 lines of code to refactor the state-of-the-art disaggregated hash table (RACE) and persistent transaction processing system (FORD) with Smart, improving their throughput by up to 132.4× and 5.2×, respectively. We have also refactored Sherman (a recent disaggregated B + Tree) with Smart and an additional speculative lookup optimization (48 lines of code changed), which changes its memory access pattern from bandwidth-bound to IOPS-bound and leads to a speedup of 2.0×. Smart is publicly available at https://github.com/madsys-dev/smart.
items.abstract_zh:
RDMA 网络的最新发展正在引领内存分解的趋势。然而，每个计算节点的性能仍然受到网络的限制，尤其是当需要执行大量并发细粒度远程访问时。根据我们的评估，现有的受 IOPS 限制的分类应用程序无法扩展到超过 32 个核心，因此无法充分利用当今的多核机器。

在深入分析 RNIC 的内部架构后，我们发现限制当今分解应用程序吞吐量的三个主要扩展瓶颈：(1) 门铃寄存器的隐式争用，(2) 过多未完成的工作请求导致的缓存垃圾，以及 (3) 不成功的 CAS 重试导致的 IOPS 浪费。然而，这些问题的解决方案涉及许多应用程序开发人员不熟悉的底层细节。为了减轻开发人员的负担，我们提出了 Smart，这是一种 RDMA 编程框架，它通过提供类似于单边 RDMA 动词的接口来隐藏上述细节。

我们用 44 行和 16 行代码用 Smart 重构了最先进的分解哈希表（RACE）和持久事务处理系统（FORD），分别将其吞吐量提高了 132.4 倍和 5.2 倍。我们还使用 Smart 和额外的推测性查找优化（更改了 48 行代码）重构了 Sherman（最近分解的 B+ 树），这将其内存访问模式从带宽限制更改为 IOPS 限制，并导致速度提高了 2.0 倍。 Smart 已在 https://github.com/madsys-dev/smart 上公开提供。

items.title: CodeCrunch: Improving Serverless Performance via Function Compression and Cost-Aware Warmup Location Optimization.
items.abstract: Serverless computing has a critical problem of function cold starts. To minimize cold starts, state-of-the-art techniques predict function invocation times to warm them up. Warmed-up functions occupy space in memory and incur a keep-alive cost, which can become exceedingly prohibitive under bursty load. To address this issue, we design CodeCrunch, which introduces the concept of serverless function compression and exploits server heterogeneity to make serverless computing more efficient, especially under high memory pressure.
items.abstract_zh: 无服务器计算存在一个关键问题：函数冷启动。为了最大限度地减少冷启动，最先进的技术可以预测函数调用时间以对其进行预热。预热函数会占用内存空间并产生保活成本，这在突发负载下可能会变得非常令人望而却步。为了解决这个问题，我们设计了 CodeCrunch，它引入了 Serverless 函数压缩的概念，并利用服务器异构性使 Serverless 计算更加高效，尤其是在高内存压力下。

items.title: CC-NIC: a Cache-Coherent Interface to the NIC.
items.abstract: Emerging interconnects make peripherals, such as the network interface controller (NIC), accessible through the processor's cache hierarchy, allowing these devices to participate in the CPU cache coherence protocol. This is a fundamental change from the separate I/O data paths and read-write transaction primitives of today's PCIe NICs. Our experiments show that the I/O data path characteristics cause NICs to prioritize CPU efficiency at the expense of inflated latency, an issue that can be mitigated by the emerging low-latency coherent interconnects. But, the coherence abstraction is not suited to current host-NIC access patterns. Applying existing signaling mechanisms and data structure layouts in a cache-coherent setting results in extraneous communication and cache retention, limiting performance. Redesigning the interface is necessary to minimize overheads and benefit from the new interactions coherence enables. This work contributes CC-NIC, a host-NIC interface design for coherent interconnects. We model CC-NIC using Intel's Ice Lake and Sapphire Rapids UPI interconnects, demonstrating the potential of optimizing for coherence. Our results show a maximum packet rate of 1.5Gpps and 980Gbps packet throughput. CC-NIC has 77% lower minimum latency, and 88% lower at 80% load, than today's PCIe NICs. We also demonstrate application-level core savings. Finally, we show that CC-NIC's benefits hold across a range of interconnect performance characteristics.
items.abstract_zh: 新兴的互连使得网络接口控制器 (NIC) 等外设可以通过处理器的缓存层次结构进行访问，从而允许这些设备参与 CPU 缓存一致性协议。这是与当今 PCIe NIC 的独立 I/O 数据路径和读写事务原语相比的根本性变化。我们的实验表明，I/O 数据路径特性导致 NIC 以牺牲延迟为代价优先考虑 CPU 效率，这一问题可以通过新兴的低延迟一致互连来缓解。但是，一致性抽象并不适合当前的主机 NIC 访问模式。在缓存一致性设置中应用现有的信号机制和数据结构布局会导致无关的通信和缓存保留，从而限制性能。重新设计界面对于最大限度地减少开销并从新的交互一致性中受益是必要的。这项工作贡献了 CC-NIC，一种用于相干互连的主机-NIC 接口设计。我们使用英特尔的 Ice Lake 和 Sapphire Rapids UPI 互连对 CC-NIC 进行建模，展示了优化一致性的潜力。我们的结果显示最大数据包速率为 1.5Gpps，数据包吞吐量为 980Gbps。与当今的 PCIe NIC 相比，CC-NIC 的最小延迟降低了 77%，在 80% 负载时降低了 88%。我们还展示了应用程序级核心节省。最后，我们展示了 CC-NIC 的优势适用于一系列互连性能特征。

items.title: Cocco: Hardware-Mapping Co-Exploration towards Memory Capacity-Communication Optimization.
items.abstract:
Memory is a critical design consideration in current data-intensive DNN accelerators, as it profoundly determines energy consumption, bandwidth requirements, and area costs. As DNN structures become more complex, a larger on-chip memory capacity is required to reduce data movement overhead, but at the expense of silicon costs. Some previous works have proposed memory-oriented optimizations, such as different data reuse and layer fusion schemes. However, these methods are not general and potent enough to cope with various graph structures.

In this paper, we explore the intrinsic connection between network structures and memory features to optimize both hardware and mapping. First, we introduce a graph-level execution scheme with a corresponding dataflow and memory management method. This scheme enables the execution of arbitrary graph patterns with high data reuse and low hardware overhead. Subsequently, we propose Cocco, a hardware-mapping co-exploration framework leveraging graph-level features of networks. It aims to minimize communication overhead, such as energy consumption and bandwidth requirements, with a smaller memory capacity. We formulate the graph-partition scheduling and memory configuration search as an optimization problem and employ a genetic-based method to achieve efficient co-exploration for large and irregular networks. Experiments demonstrate that Cocco obtains lower external memory access, lower bandwidth requirements, and more stable optimization for graph partition compared to the greedy algorithm and dynamic programming introduced in prior works. Cocco also reduces the costs by 1.89% to 50.33% using co-exploration compared to other typical methods.
items.abstract_zh:
内存是当前数据密集型 DNN 加速器中的一个关键设计考虑因素，因为它深刻地决定了能耗、带宽要求和面积成本。随着 DNN 结构变得更加复杂，需要更大的片上存储器容量来减少数据移动开销，但代价是硅成本。之前的一些工作提出了面向内存的优化，例如不同的数据重用和层融合方案。然而，这些方法不够通用和有效，不足以应对各种图结构。

在本文中，我们探索网络结构和内存特征之间的内在联系，以优化硬件和映射。首先，我们介绍一种图级执行方案以及相应的数据流和内存管理方法。该方案能够以高数据重用和低硬件开销执行任意图形模式。随后，我们提出了 Cocco，一种利用网络图级特征的硬件映射协同探索框架。它旨在以较小的内存容量最小化通信开销，例如能耗和带宽要求。我们将图分区调度和内存配置搜索制定为优化问题，并采用基于遗传的方法来实现大型且不规则网络的有效协同探索。实验表明，与先前作品中引入的贪婪算法和动态规划相比，Cocco 获得了更少的外部内存访问、更低的带宽要求以及更稳定的图分区优化。与其他典型方法相比，Cocco 使用共探方法还可以降低成本 1.89% 至 50.33%。

items.title: TrackFM: Far-out Compiler Support for a Far Memory World.
items.abstract: Large memory workloads with favorable locality of reference can benefit by extending the memory hierarchy across machines. Systems that enable such far memory configurations can improve application performance and overall memory utilization in a cluster. There are two current alternatives for software-based far memory: kernel-based and library-based. Kernel-based approaches sacrifice performance to achieve programmer transparency, while library-based approaches sacrifice programmer transparency to achieve performance. We argue for a novel third approach, the compiler-based approach, which sacrifices neither performance nor programmer transparency. Modern compiler analysis and transformation techniques, combined with a suitable tightly-coupled runtime system, enable this approach. We describe the design, implementation, and evaluation of TrackFM, a new compiler-based far memory system. Through extensive benchmarking, we demonstrate that TrackFM outperforms kernel-based approaches by up to 2× while retaining their programmer transparency, and that TrackFM can perform similarly to a state-of-the-art library-based system (within 10%). The application is merely recompiled to reap these benefits.
items.abstract_zh: 具有有利的引用局部性的大内存工作负载可以通过跨机器扩展内存层次结构而受益。启用如此远的内存配置的系统可以提高集群中的应用程序性能和整体内存利用率。当前基于软件的远存储器有两种替代方案：基于内核和基于库。基于内核的方法牺牲性能来实现程序员的透明度，而基于库的方法则牺牲程序员的透明度来实现性能。我们主张采用新颖的第三种方法，即基于编译器的方法，它既不牺牲性能，也不牺牲程序员的透明度。现代编译器分析和转换技术与合适的紧密耦合运行时系统相结合，使这种方法成为可能。我们描述了 TrackFM（一种新的基于编译器的远存储系统）的设计、实现和评估。通过广泛的基准测试，我们证明 TrackFM 的性能比基于内核的方法高出 2 倍，同时保留了程序员的透明度，并且 TrackFM 的性能与最先进的基于库的系统类似（10% 以内）。只需重新编译应用程序即可获得这些好处。

items.title: Automatic Generation of Vectorizing Compilers for Customizable Digital Signal Processors.
items.abstract:
Embedded applications extract the best power-performance trade-off from digital signal processors (DSPs) by making extensive use of vectorized execution. Rather than handwriting the many customized kernels these applications use, DSP engineers rely on auto-vectorizing compilers to quickly produce effective code. Building these compilers is a large and error-prone investment, and each new DSP architecture or application-specific ISA customization must repeat this effort to derive a new high-performance compiler.

We present Isaria, a framework for automatically generating vectorizing compilers for DSP architectures. Isaria uses equality saturation to search for vectorized DSP code using a system of rewrite rules. Rather than hand-crafting these rules, Isaria automatically synthesizes sound rewrite rules from an ISA specification, discovers phase structure within these rules that improve compilation performance, and schedules their application at compile time while pruning intermediate states of the search. We use Isaria to generate a compiler for an industrial DSP architecture, and show that the resulting kernels outperform existing DSP libraries by up to 6.9× and are competitive with those generated by expert-built compilers. We also demonstrate how Isaria can speed up exploration of new ISA customizations by automatically generating a high-quality vectorizing compiler.
items.abstract_zh:
嵌入式应用通过广泛使用矢量化执行，从数字信号处理器 (DSP) 中获取最佳功耗性能权衡。 DSP 工程师依靠自动矢量化编译器来快速生成有效的代码，而不是手写这些应用程序使用的许多定制内核。构建这些编译器是一项巨大且容易出错的投资，每个新的 DSP 架构或特定于应用程序的 ISA 定制都必须重复这项工作才能获得新的高性能编译器。

我们提出了 Isaria，一个为 DSP 架构自动生成矢量化编译器的框架。 Isaria 使用等式饱和度通过重写规则系统来搜索矢量化 DSP 代码。 Isaria 不是手工制定这些规则，而是自动从 ISA 规范合成健全的重写规则，发现这些规则中的阶段结构以提高编译性能，并在编译时安排其应用程序，同时修剪搜索的中间状态。我们使用 Isaria 为工业 DSP 架构生成编译器，并表明生成的内核比现有 DSP 库性能高出 6.9 倍，并且与专家构建的编译器生成的内核相比具有竞争力。我们还演示了 Isaria 如何通过自动生成高质量的矢量化编译器来加快对新 ISA 自定义的探索。

items.title: Exploiting Human Color Discrimination for Memory- and Energy-Efficient Image Encoding in Virtual Reality.
items.abstract: Virtual Reality (VR) has the potential of becoming the next ubiquitous computing platform. Continued progress in the burgeoning field of VR depends critically on an efficient computing substrate. In particular, DRAM access energy is known to contribute to a significant portion of system energy. Today's framebuffer compression system alleviates the DRAM traffic by using a numerically lossless compression algorithm. Being numerically lossless, however, is unnecessary to preserve perceptual quality for humans. This paper proposes a perceptually lossless, but numerically lossy, system to compress DRAM traffic. Our idea builds on top of long-established psychophysical studies that show that humans cannot discriminate colors that are close to each other. The discrimination ability becomes even weaker (i.e., more colors are perceptually indistinguishable) in our peripheral vision. Leveraging the color discrimination (in)ability, we propose an algorithm that adjusts pixel colors to minimize the bit encoding cost without introducing visible artifacts. The algorithm is coupled with lightweight architectural support that, in real-time, reduces the DRAM traffic by 66.9% and outperforms existing framebuffer compression mechanisms by up to 20.4%. Psychophysical studies on human participants show that our system introduce little to no perceptual fidelity degradation.
items.abstract_zh: 虚拟现实（VR）有潜力成为下一个无处不在的计算平台。 VR 新兴领域的持续进步关键取决于高效的计算基板。特别是，已知 DRAM 存取能量占系统能量的很大一部分。当今的帧缓冲区压缩系统通过使用数值无损压缩算法来减轻 DRAM 流量。然而，数字无损对于保持人类的感知质量来说是不必要的。本文提出了一种感知上无损但数值上有损的系统来压缩 DRAM 流量。我们的想法建立在长期建立的心理物理学研究之上，这些研究表明人类无法区分彼此接近的颜色。我们的周边视觉的辨别能力变得更弱（即，更多的颜色在感知上无法区分）。利用颜色辨别能力，我们提出了一种算法，可以调整像素颜色以最小化位编码成本，而不会引入可见的伪影。该算法与轻量级架构支持相结合，可实时将 DRAM 流量减少 66.9%，性能比现有帧缓冲区压缩机制高出 20.4%。对人类参与者的心理物理学研究表明，我们的系统几乎没有引入感知保真度下降。

items.title: Lightweight, Modular Verification for WebAssembly-to-Native Instruction Selection.
items.abstract: Language-level guarantees---like module runtime isolation for WebAssembly (Wasm)---are only as strong as the compiler that produces a final, native-machine-specific executable. The process of lowering language-level constructions to ISA-specific instructions can introduce subtle bugs that violate security guarantees. In this paper, we present Crocus, a system for lightweight, modular verification of instruction-lowering rules within Cranelift, a production retargetable Wasm native code generator. We use Crocus to verify lowering rules that cover WebAssembly 1.0 support for integer operations in the ARM aarch64 backend. We show that Crocus can reproduce 3 known bugs (including a 9.9/10 severity CVE), identify 2 previously-unknown bugs and an underspecified compiler invariant, and help analyze the root causes of a new bug.
items.abstract_zh: 语言级保证（例如 WebAssembly (Wasm) 的模块运行时隔离）的强度取决于生成最终的、本机特定可执行文件的编译器。将语言级构造降低为 ISA 特定指令的过程可能会引入违反安全保证的微妙错误。在本文中，我们介绍了 Crocus，这是一个用于在 Cranelift 中对指令降低规则进行轻量级模块化验证的系统，Cranelift 是一种生产可重定向 Wasm 本机代码生成器。我们使用 Crocus 来验证降低规则，这些规则涵盖了 ARM aarch64 后端中对整数运算的 WebAssembly 1.0 支持。我们证明 Crocus 可以重现 3 个已知错误（包括 9.9/10 严重性 CVE），识别 2 个先前未知的错误和一个未指定的编译器不变量，并帮助分析新错误的根本原因。

items.title: Optimizing Deep Learning Inference via Global Analysis and Tensor Expressions.
items.abstract: Optimizing deep neural network (DNN) execution is important but becomes increasingly difficult as DNN complexity grows. Existing DNN compilers cannot effectively exploit optimization opportunities across operator boundaries, leaving room for improvement. To address this challenge, we present Souffle, an open-source compiler that optimizes DNN inference across operator boundaries. Souffle creates a global tensor dependency graph using tensor expressions, traces data flow and tensor information, and partitions the computation graph into subprograms based on dataflow analysis and resource constraints. Within a subprogram, Souffle performs local optimization via semantic-preserving transformations, finds an optimized program schedule, and improves instruction-level parallelism and data reuse. We evaluated Souffle using six representative DNN models on an NVIDIA A100 GPU. Experimental results show that Souffle consistently outperforms six state-of-the-art DNN optimizers by delivering a geometric mean speedup of up to 3.7× over TensorRT and 7.8× over Tensorflow XLA.
items.abstract_zh: 优化深度神经网络 (DNN) 执行很重要，但随着 DNN 复杂性的增加而变得越来越困难。现有的 DNN 编译器无法有效地利用跨算子边界的优化机会，因此还有改进的空间。为了应对这一挑战，我们推出了 Souffle，这是一个开源编译器，可以优化跨算子边界的 DNN 推理。 Souffle 使用张量表达式创建全局张量依赖图，跟踪数据流和张量信息，并根据数据流分析和资源约束将计算图划分为子程序。在子程序中，Souffle 通过语义保留转换执行局部优化，找到优化的程序调度，并提高指令级并行性和数据重用。我们在 NVIDIA A100 GPU 上使用六个代表性 DNN 模型对 Souffle 进行了评估。实验结果表明，Souffle 的几何平均加速比 TensorRT 高达 3.7 倍，比 Tensorflow XLA 高达 7.8 倍，始终优于六种最先进的 DNN 优化器。

items.title: SoCFlow: Efficient and Scalable DNN Training on SoC-Clustered Edge Servers.
items.abstract:
SoC-Cluster, a novel server architecture composed of massive mobile system-on-chips (SoCs), is gaining popularity in industrial edge computing due to its energy efficiency and compatibility with existing mobile applications. However, we observe that the deployed SoC-Cluster servers are not fully utilized, because the hosted workloads are mostly user-triggered and have significant tidal phenomena. To harvest the free cycles, we propose to co-locate deep learning tasks on them.

We present SoCFlow, the first framework that can efficiently train deep learning models on SoC-Cluster. To deal with the intrinsic inadequacy of commercial SoC-Cluster servers, SoCFlow incorporates two novel techniques: (1) the group-wise parallelism with delayed aggregation that can train deep learning models fast and scalably without being influenced by the network bottleneck; (2) the data-parallel mixed-precision training algorithm that can fully unleash the heterogeneous processors' capability of mobile SoCs. We have fully implemented SoCFlow and demonstrated its effectiveness through extensive experiments. The experiments show that SoCFlow significantly and consistently outperforms all baselines regarding the training speed while preserving the convergence accuracy, e.g., 1.6×--740× convergence speedup with 32 SoCs. Compared to commodity GPU (NVIDIA V100) under the same power budget, SoCFlow achieves comparable training speed but reduces energy consumption by 2.31×--10.23× with the same convergence accuracy.
items.abstract_zh:
SoC-Cluster是一种由大规模移动片上系统（SoC）组成的新型服务器架构，由于其能源效率和与现有移动应用的兼容性，在工业边缘计算中越来越受欢迎。然而，我们观察到部署的 SoC-Cluster 服务器并未得到充分利用，因为托管的工作负载大部分是用户触发的，并且具有明显的潮汐现象。为了收获免费周期，我们建议在它们上共同部署深度学习任务。

我们推出了 SoCFlow，这是第一个可以在 SoC-Cluster 上有效训练深度学习模型的框架。为了解决商用SoC-Cluster服务器的固有不足，SoCFlow采用了两项新技术：（1）具有延迟聚合的分组并行性，可以快速且可扩展地训练深度学习模型，而不受网络瓶颈的影响； (2)数据并行混合精度训练算法，充分发挥移动SoC异构处理器的能力。我们已经全面实现了SoCFlow，并通过大量实验证明了其有效性。实验表明，SoCFlow 在训练速度方面始终显着优于所有基准，同时保持收敛精度，例如，32 个 SoC 的收敛速度为 1.6×--740×。与相同功耗预算下的商用 GPU（NVIDIA V100）相比，SoCFlow 实现了相当的训练速度，但在相同的收敛精度下降低了 2.31×--10.23× 的能耗。

items.title: BypassD: Enabling fast userspace access to shared SSDs.
items.abstract:
Modern storage devices, such as Optane NVMe SSDs, offer ultra-low latency of a few microseconds and high bandwidth of multiple gigabytes per second. At these speeds, the kernel software I/O stack is a substantial source of overhead. Userspace approaches avoid kernel software overheads but face challenges in supporting shared storage without major changes to file systems, the OS or the hardware.

We propose a new I/O architecture, BypassD , for fast, userspace access to shared storage devices. BypassD takes inspiration from virtual memory: it uses virtual addresses to access a device and relies on hardware for translation and protection. Like memory-mapping a file, the OS kernel constructs a mapping for file contents in the page table. Userspace I/O requests then use virtual addresses from these mappings to specify which file and file offset to access. BypassD extends the IOMMU hardware to translate file offsets into device Logical Block Addresses. Existing applications require no modifications to use BypassD. Our evaluation shows that BypassD reduces latency for 4KB accesses by 42% compared to standard Linux kernel and performs close to userspace techniques like SPDK that do not support device sharing. By eliminating software overheads, BypassD improves performance of real workloads, such as the WiredTiger storage engine, by ~20%.
items.abstract_zh:
现代存储设备（例如 Optane NVMe SSD）可提供几微秒的超低延迟和每秒数 GB 的高带宽。在这些速度下，内核软件 I/O 堆栈是开销的重要来源。用户空间方法避免了内核软件开销，但在支持共享存储而不对文件系统、操作系统或硬件进行重大更改方面面临着挑战。

我们提出了一种新的 I/O 架构 BypassD，用于在用户空间快速访问共享存储设备。 BypassD 从虚拟内存中获得灵感：它使用虚拟地址来访问设备，并依赖硬件进行转换和保护。就像内存映射文件一样，操作系统内核在页表中构造文件内容的映射。然后，用户空间 I/O 请求使用这些映射中的虚拟地址来指定要访问的文件和文件偏移量。 BypassD 扩展了 IOMMU 硬件，将文件偏移量转换为设备逻辑块地址。现有应用程序无需修改即可使用 BypassD。我们的评估表明，与标准 Linux 内核相比，BypassD 将 4KB 访问的延迟减少了 42%，并且性能接近不支持设备共享的 SPDK 等用户空间技术。通过消除软件开销，BypassD 将真实工作负载（例如 WiredTiger 存储引擎）的性能提高了约 20%。

items.title: HIDA: A Hierarchical Dataflow Compiler for High-Level Synthesis.
items.abstract: Dataflow architectures are growing in popularity due to their potential to mitigate the challenges posed by the memory wall inherent to the Von Neumann architecture. At the same time, high-level synthesis (HLS) has demonstrated its efficacy as a design methodology for generating efficient dataflow architectures within a short development cycle. However, existing HLS tools rely on developers to explore the vast dataflow design space, ultimately leading to suboptimal designs. This phenomenon is especially concerning as the size of the HLS design grows. To tackle these challenges, we introduce HIDA 1 , a new scalable and hierarchical HLS framework that can systematically convert an algorithmic description into a dataflow implementation on hardware. We first propose a collection of efficient and versatile dataflow representations for modeling the hierarchical dataflow structure. Capitalizing on these representations, we develop an automated optimizer that decomposes the dataflow optimization problem into multiple levels based on the inherent dataflow hierarchy. Using FPGAs as an evaluation platform, working with a set of neural networks modeled in PyTorch, HIDA achieves up to 8.54× higher throughput compared to the state-of-the-art (SOTA) HLS optimization tool. Furthermore, despite being fully automated and able to handle various applications, HIDA achieves 1.29× higher throughput over the SOTA RTL-based neural network accelerators on an FPGA.
items.abstract_zh: 数据流架构越来越受欢迎，因为它们有可能减轻冯·诺依曼架构固有的内存墙带来的挑战。与此同时，高级综合（HLS）已经证明了其作为一种设计方法的功效，可以在较短的开发周期内生成高效的数据流架构。然而，现有的 HLS 工具依赖开发人员探索广阔的数据流设计空间，最终导致设计不理想。随着 HLS 设计规模的增大，这种现象尤其令人担忧。为了应对这些挑战，我们引入了 HIDA 1，这是一种新的可扩展的分层 HLS 框架，可以系统地将算法描述转换为硬件上的数据流实现。我们首先提出了一组高效且通用的数据流表示形式，用于对分层数据流结构进行建模。利用这些表示，我们开发了一个自动优化器，它根据固有的数据流层次结构将数据流优化问题分解为多个级别。 HIDA 使用 FPGA 作为评估平台，与 PyTorch 中建模的一组神经网络配合使用，与最先进的 (SOTA) HLS 优化工具相比，吞吐量提高了 8.54 倍。此外，尽管 HIDA 是完全自动化的并且能够处理各种应用，但其吞吐量比 FPGA 上基于 SOTA RTL 的神经网络加速器高出 1.29 倍。

items.title: RainbowCake: Mitigating Cold-starts in Serverless with Layer-wise Container Caching and Sharing.
items.abstract:
Serverless computing has grown rapidly as a new cloud computing paradigm that promises ease-of-management, cost-efficiency, and auto-scaling by shipping functions via self-contained virtualized containers. Unfortunately, serverless computing suffers from severe cold-start problems---starting containers incurs non-trivial latency. Full container caching is widely applied to mitigate cold-starts, yet has recently been outperformed by two lines of research: partial container caching and container sharing. However, either partial container caching or container sharing techniques exhibit their drawbacks. Partial container caching effectively deals with burstiness while leaving cold-start mitigation halfway; container sharing reduces cold-starts by enabling containers to serve multiple functions while suffering from excessive memory waste due to over-packed containers.

This paper proposes RainbowCake , a layer-wise container pre-warming and keep-alive technique that effectively mitigates cold-starts with sharing awareness at minimal waste of memory. With structured container layers and sharing-aware modeling, RainbowCake is robust and tolerant to invocation bursts. We seize the opportunity of container sharing behind the startup process of standard container techniques. RainbowCake breaks the container startup process of a container into three stages and manages different container layers individually. We develop a sharing-aware algorithm that makes event-driven layer-wise caching decisions in real-time. Experiments on OpenWhisk clusters with real-world workloads show that RainbowCake reduces 68% function startup latency and 77% memory waste compared to state-of-the-art solutions.
items.abstract_zh:
无服务器计算作为一种新的云计算范例迅速发展，它通过独立的虚拟化容器传输功能，从而实现易于管理、成本效益和自动扩展。不幸的是，无服务器计算面临严重的冷启动问题——启动容器会产生不小的延迟。完整容器缓存广泛应用于缓解冷启动，但最近的表现被以下两方面的研究所超越：部分容器缓存和容器共享。然而，部分容器缓存或容器共享技术都存在其缺点。部分容器缓存有效地处理突发性，同时半途而废地缓解冷启动；容器共享通过使容器能够提供多种功能来减少冷启动，同时避免因容器过度包装而造成过多的内存浪费。

本文提出了RainbowCake，一种分层容器预热和保持活动的技术，可以以最小的内存浪费共享意识，有效地缓解冷启动。凭借结构化容器层和共享感知建模，RainbowCake 非常强大且能够容忍突发调用。我们抓住了标准容器技术启动过程背后的容器共享的机会。 RainbowCake将容器的启动过程分为三个阶段，分别管理不同的容器层。我们开发了一种共享感知算法，可以实时做出事件驱动的分层缓存决策。在具有实际工作负载的 OpenWhisk 集群上进行的实验表明，与最先进的解决方案相比，RainbowCake 减少了 68% 的函数启动延迟和 77% 的内存浪费。

items.title: Formal Mechanised Semantics of CHERI C: Capabilities, Undefined Behaviour, and Provenance.
items.abstract:
Memory safety issues are a persistent source of security vulnerabilities, with conventional architectures and the C codebase chronically prone to exploitable errors. The CHERI research project has shown how one can provide radically improved security for that existing codebase with minimal modification, using unforgeable hardware capabilities in place of machine-word pointers in CHERI dialects of C, implemented as adaptions of Clang/LLVM and GCC. CHERI was first prototyped as extensions of MIPS and RISC-V; it is currently being evaluated by Arm and others with the Arm Morello experimental architecture, processor, and platform, to explore its potential for mass-market adoption, and by Microsoft in their CHERIoT design for embedded cores.

There is thus considerable practical experience with CHERI C implementation and use, but exactly what CHERI C's semantics is (or should be) remains an open question. In this paper, we present the first attempt to rigorously and comprehensively define CHERI C semantics, discuss key semantics design questions relating to capabilities, provenance, and undefined behaviour, and clarify them with semantics in multiple complementary forms: in prose, as an executable semantics adapting the Cerberus C semantics, and mechanised in Coq.

This establishes a solid foundation for CHERI C, for those porting code to it, for compiler implementers, and for future semantics and verification.
items.abstract_zh:
内存安全问题是安全漏洞的持久来源，传统架构和 C 代码库长期容易出现可利用的错误。 CHERI 研究项目展示了如何通过最少的修改，使用不可伪造的硬件功能代替 C CHERI 方言中的机器字指针（以 Clang/LLVM 和 GCC 的改编实现），从根本上提高现有代码库的安全性。 CHERI 最初的原型是作为 MIPS 和 RISC-V 的扩展；目前，Arm 和其他公司正在使用 Arm Morello 实验架构、处理器和平台对其进行评估，以探索其大众市场采用的潜力，而 Microsoft 也正在其嵌入式内核的 CHERIoT 设计中对其进行评估。

因此，CHERI C 的实现和使用有相当多的实践经验，但 CHERI C 的语义到底是什么（或应该是什么）仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在本文中，我们首次尝试严格、全面地定义 CHERI C 语义，讨论与功能、来源和未定义行为相关的关键语义设计问题，并用多种互补形式的语义来澄清它们：在散文中，作为适应 Cerberus C 语义的可执行语义，并在 Coq 中机械化。

这为 CHERI C、向其移植代码的人员、编译器实现者以及未来的语义和验证奠定了坚实的基础。

items.title: Everywhere All at Once: Co-Location Attacks on Public Cloud FaaS.
items.abstract:
Microarchitectural side-channel attacks exploit shared hardware resources, posing significant threats to modern systems. A pivotal step in these attacks is achieving physical host co-location between attacker and victim. This step is especially challenging in public cloud environments due to the widespread adoption of the virtual private cloud (VPC) and the ever-growing size of the data centers. Furthermore, the shift towards Function-as-a-Service (FaaS) environments, characterized by dynamic function instance placements and limited control for attackers, compounds this challenge.

In this paper, we present the first comprehensive study on risks of and techniques for co-location attacks in public cloud FaaS environments. We develop two physical host fingerprinting techniques and propose a new, inexpensive methodology for large-scale instance co-location verification. Using these techniques, we analyze how Google Cloud Run places function instances on physical hosts and identify exploitable placement behaviors. Leveraging our findings, we devise an effective strategy for instance launching that achieves 100% probability of co-locating the attacker with at least one victim instance. Moreover, the attacker co-locates with 61%--100% of victim instances in three major Cloud Run data centers.
items.abstract_zh:
微架构侧通道攻击利用共享硬件资源，对现代系统构成重大威胁。这些攻击的关键一步是实现攻击者和受害者之间的物理主机共置。由于虚拟私有云 (VPC) 的广泛采用和数据中心规模的不断增长，这一步骤在公共云环境中尤其具有挑战性。此外，向功能即服务 (FaaS) 环境的转变（以动态功能实例放置和攻击者的有限控制为特征）加剧了这一挑战。

在本文中，我们首次全面研究了公共云 FaaS 环境中共址攻击的风险和技术。我们开发了两种物理主机指纹识别技术，并提出了一种用于大规模实例共置验证的新的、廉价的方法。使用这些技术，我们分析 Google Cloud Run 如何在物理主机上放置函数实例并识别可利用的放置行为。利用我们的发现，我们设计了一种有效的实例启动策略，可以 100% 的概率将攻击者与至少一个受害者实例放在同一位置。此外，攻击者与三个主要 Cloud Run 数据中心中 61%--100% 的受害者实例共存。

items.title: Training Job Placement in Clusters with Statistical In-Network Aggregation.
items.abstract: In-Network Aggregation (INA) offloads the gradient aggregation in distributed training (DT) onto programmable switches, where the switch memory could be allocated to jobs in either synchronous or statistical multiplexing mode. Statistical INA has advantages in switch memory utilization, control-plane simplicity, and management safety, but it faces the problem of cross-layer resource efficiency in job placement. This paper presents a job placement system NetPack for clusters with statistical INA, which aims to maximize the utilization of both computation and network resources. NetPack periodically batches and places jobs into the cluster. When placing a job, NetPack runs a steady state estimation algorithm to acquire the available resources in the cluster, heuristically values each server according to its available resources (GPU and bandwidth), and runs a dynamic programming algorithm to efficiently search for servers with the highest value for the job. Our prototype of NetPack and the experiments demonstrate that NetPack outperforms prior job placement methods by 45% in terms of average job completion time on production traces.
items.abstract_zh: 网内聚合 (INA) 将分布式训练 (DT) 中的梯度聚合卸载到可编程交换机上，其中交换机内存可以以同步或统计复用模式分配给作业。统计INA在交换机内存利用率、控制平面简单性和管理安全性方面具有优势，但在作业安置方面面临跨层资源效率的问题。本文提出了一种具有统计 INA 的集群作业分配系统 NetPack，旨在最大限度地利用计算和网络资源。 NetPack 定期批处理作业并将其放入集群中。在放置作业时，NetPack 会运行稳态估计算法来获取集群中的可用资源，根据每个服务器的可用资源（GPU 和带宽）启发式评估每个服务器，并运行动态编程算法来有效地搜索作业价值最高的服务器。我们的 NetPack 原型和实验表明，就生产跟踪的平均作业完成时间而言，NetPack 的性能比之前的作业布置方法高出 45%。

items.title: Carat: Unlocking Value-Level Parallelism for Multiplier-Free GEMMs.
items.abstract: In recent years, hardware architectures optimized for general matrix multiplication (GEMM) have been well studied to deliver better performance and efficiency for deep neural networks. With trends towards batched, low-precision data, e.g., FP8 format in this work, we observe that there is growing untapped potential for value reuse. We propose a novel computing paradigm, value-level parallelism, whereby unique products are computed only once, and different inputs subscribe to (select) their products via temporal coding. Our architecture, Carat, employs value-level parallelism and transforms multiplication into accumulation, performing GEMMs with efficient multiplier-free hardware. Experiments show that, on average, Carat improves iso-area throughput and energy efficiency by 1.02× and 1.06× over a systolic array and 3.2× and 4.3× when scaled up to multiple nodes.
items.abstract_zh: 近年来，针对通用矩阵乘法（GEMM）优化的硬件架构得到了深入研究，以为深度神经网络提供更好的性能和效率。随着批量、低精度数据的趋势，例如本工作中的 FP8 格式，我们观察到价值重用的未开发潜力越来越大。我们提出了一种新颖的计算范式，即值级并行性，其中唯一的产品仅计算一次，并且不同的输入通过时间编码订阅（选择）其产品。我们的架构 Carat 采用值级并行性，并将乘法转换为累加，使用高效的无乘法器硬件执行 GEMM。实验表明，平均而言，Carat 相比脉动阵列将等面积吞吐量和能源效率提高了 1.02 倍和 1.06 倍，在扩展到多个节点时分别提高了 3.2 倍和 4.3 倍。

items.title: SEVeriFast: Minimizing the root of trust for fast startup of SEV microVMs.
items.abstract:
Serverless computing platforms rely on fast container initialization to provide low latency and high throughput for requests. While hardware enforced trusted execution environments (TEEs) have gained popularity, confidential computing has yet to be widely adopted by latency-sensitive platforms due to its additional initialization overhead. We investigate the application of AMD's Secure Encrypted Virtualization (SEV) to microVMs and find that current startup times for confidential VMs are prohibitively slow due to the high cost of establishing a root of trust for each new VM.

We present SEVeriFast, a new bootstrap scheme for SEV VMs that reevaluates current microVM techniques for fast boot, such as eliminating bootstrap stages and bypassing guest kernel decompression. Counter-intuitively, we find that introducing an additional bootstrap component and reintroducing kernel compression optimizes the cold boot performance of SEV microVMs by reducing the cost of measurement on the critical boot path and producing a minimal root of trust. To our knowledge, SEVeriFast is the first work to explore the trade-offs associated with booting confidential microVMs and provide a set of guiding principles as a step toward confidential serverless. We show that SEVeriFast improves cold start performance of SEV VMs over current methods by 86-93%.
items.abstract_zh:
无服务器计算平台依靠快速容器初始化来为请求提供低延迟和高吞吐量。虽然硬件强制可信执行环境 (TEE) 已经普及，但由于其额外的初始化开销，机密计算尚未被延迟敏感平台广泛采用。我们研究了 AMD 安全加密虚拟化 (SEV) 在 microVM 中的应用，发现由于为每个新 VM 建立信任根的成本高昂，当前机密 VM 的启动时间非常慢。

我们推出了 SEVeriFast，这是一种针对 SEV VM 的新引导方案，它重新评估当前的 microVM 技术以实现快速引导，例如消除引导阶段和绕过来宾内核解压缩。与直觉相反，我们发现引入额外的引导组件并重新引入内核压缩可以通过降低关键引导路径上的测量成本并生成最小信任根来优化 SEV microVM 的冷启动性能。据我们所知，SEVeriFast 是第一个探索与启动机密 microVM 相关的权衡的工作，并提供了一套指导原则作为迈向机密无服务器的一步。我们表明，与当前方法相比，SEVeriFast 将 SEV 虚拟机的冷启动性能提高了 86-93%。

items.title: Direct Memory Translation for Virtualized Clouds.
items.abstract: Virtual memory translation has become a key performance bottleneck of memory-intensive workloads in virtualized cloud environments. On the x86 architecture, a nested translation needs to sequentially fetch up to 24 page table entries (PTEs). This paper presents Direct Memory Translation (DMT), a hardware-software extension for x86-based virtual memory that minimizes translation overhead while maintaining backward compatibility with x86. In DMT, the OS manages last-level PTEs in a contiguous physical memory region, termed Translation Entry Areas (TEAs). DMT establishes a direct mapping from each virtual page in a Virtual Memory Area (VMA) to the corresponding PTE in a TEA. Since processes manage memory with a handful of major VMAs, the mapping can be maintained per VMA and effectively stored in a few dedicated registers. DMT further optimizes virtualized memory translation via guest-host cooperation by directly allocating guest TEAs in physical memory, bypassing intermediate virtualization layers. DMT is inherently scalable---it takes one, two, and three memory references in native, virtualized, and nested virtualized setups. Its scalability enables hardware-assisted translation for nested virtualization. Our evaluation shows that DMT significantly speeds up page walks by an average of 1.58x (1.65x with THP) in a virtualized setup, resulting in 1.20x (1.14x with THP) speedup of application execution on average.
items.abstract_zh: 虚拟内存转换已成为虚拟化云环境中内存密集型工作负载的关键性能瓶颈。在 x86 架构上，嵌套翻译需要顺序获取最多 24 个页表条目 (PTE)。本文介绍了直接内存转换 (DMT)，它是基于 x86 的虚拟内存的硬件软件扩展，可最大限度地减少转换开销，同时保持与 x86 的向后兼容性。在 DMT 中，操作系统管理连续物理内存区域中的最后一级 PTE，称为翻译条目区域 (TEA)。 DMT 建立从虚拟内存区域 (VMA) 中的每个虚拟页到 TEA 中相应 PTE 的直接映射。由于进程使用少数主要 VMA 来管理内存，因此可以按 VMA 维护映射并有效地将其存储在一些专用寄存器中。 DMT 通过直接在物理内存中分配来宾 TEA，绕过中间虚拟化层，通过来宾主机协作进一步优化虚拟化内存转换。 DMT 本质上是可扩展的——它在本机、虚拟化和嵌套虚拟化设置中需要一个、两个和三个内存引用。其可扩展性支持嵌套虚拟化的硬件辅助转换。我们的评估表明，DMT 在虚拟化设置中显着地将页面遍历速度平均提高了 1.58 倍（使用 THP 时为 1.65 倍），从而使应用程序执行速度平均提高了 1.20 倍（使用 THP 时为 1.14 倍）。

items.title: GMLake: Efficient and Transparent GPU Memory Defragmentation for Large-scale DNN Training with Virtual Memory Stitching.
items.abstract: Large-scale deep neural networks (DNNs), such as large language models (LLMs), have revolutionized the artificial intelligence (AI) field and become increasingly popular. However, training or fine-tuning such models requires substantial computational power and resources, where the memory capacity of a single acceleration device like a GPU is one of the most important bottlenecks. Owing to the prohibitively large overhead (e.g., 10×) of GPUs' native memory allocator, DNN frameworks like PyTorch and TensorFlow adopt a caching allocator that maintains a memory pool with a splitting mechanism for fast memory (de)allocation. Unfortunately, the caching allocator's efficiency degrades quickly for popular memory reduction techniques such as re-computation, offloading, distributed training, and low-rank adaptation. The primary reason is that those memory reduction techniques introduce frequent and irregular memory (de)allocation requests, leading to severe fragmentation problems for the splitting-based caching allocator. To mitigate this fragmentation problem, we propose a novel memory allocation framework based on low-level GPU virtual memory management called GPU memory lake (GMLake). GMLake employs a novel virtual memory stitching (VMS) mechanism, which can fuse or combine non-contiguous memory blocks with a virtual memory address mapping. GMLake can reduce average of 9.2 GB (up to 25 GB) GPU memory usage and 15% (up to 33%) fragmentation among eight LLM models on GPU A100 with 80 GB memory. GMLake is completely transparent to the DNN models and memory reduction techniques and ensures the seamless execution of resource-intensive deep-learning tasks. We have open-sourced GMLake at https://github.com/intelligent-machine-learning/glake/tree/main/GMLake.
items.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 等大规模深度神经网络 (DNN) 彻底改变了人工智能 (AI) 领域并变得越来越受欢迎。然而，训练或微调此类模型需要大量的计算能力和资源，其中 GPU 等单个加速设备的内存容量是最重要的瓶颈之一。由于 GPU 的本机内存分配器的开销过大（例如 10 倍），PyTorch 和 TensorFlow 等 DNN 框架采用缓存分配器，该分配器通过分裂机制维护内存池，以实现快速内存（解除）分配。不幸的是，对于流行的内存减少技术（例如重新计算、卸载、分布式训练和低秩适应），缓存分配器的效率会迅速下降。主要原因是这些内存减少技术引入了频繁且不规则的内存（解除）分配请求，导致基于拆分的缓存分配器出现严重的碎片问题。为了缓解这种碎片问题，我们提出了一种基于低级 GPU 虚拟内存管理的新型内存分配框架，称为 GPU 内存湖 (GMLake)。 GMLake 采用了一种新颖的虚拟内存拼接（VMS）机制，该机制可以将非连续内存块与虚拟内存地址映射融合或组合。在具有 80 GB 内存的 GPU A100 上的 8 个 LLM 模型中，GMLake 可以平均减少 9.2 GB（最高 25 GB）GPU 内存使用量和 15%（最高 33%）的碎片。 GMLake 对 DNN 模型和内存缩减技术完全透明，确保资源密集型深度学习任务的无缝执行。我们在 https://github.com/intelligent-machine-learning/glake/tree/main/GMLake 上开源了 GMLake。

items.title: AttAcc! Unleashing the Power of PIM for Batched Transformer-based Generative Model Inference.
items.abstract: The Transformer-based generative model (TbGM), comprising summarization (Sum) and generation (Gen) stages, has demonstrated unprecedented generative performance across a wide range of applications. However, it also demands immense amounts of compute and memory resources. Especially, the Gen stages, consisting of the attention and fully-connected (FC) layers, dominate the overall execution time. Meanwhile, we reveal that the conventional system with GPUs used for TbGM inference cannot efficiently execute the attention layer, even with batching, due to various constraints. To address this inefficiency, we first propose AttAcc, a processing-in-memory (PIM) architecture for efficient execution of the attention layer. Subsequently, for the end-to-end acceleration of TbGM inference, we propose a novel heterogeneous system architecture and optimizations that strategically use xPU and PIM together. It leverages the high memory bandwidth of AttAcc for the attention layer and the powerful compute capability of the conventional system for the FC layer. Lastly, we demonstrate that our GPU-PIM system outperforms the conventional system with the same memory capacity, improving performance and energy efficiency of running a 175B TbGM by up to 2.81× and 2.67×, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 基于 Transformer 的生成模型 (TbGM) 包括汇总 (Sum) 和生成 (Gen) 阶段，在广泛的应用中展示了前所未有的生成性能。然而，它也需要大量的计算和内存资源。特别是，由注意力层和全连接（FC）层组成的 Gen 阶段主导了整体执行时间。同时，我们发现，由于各种限制，用于 TbGM 推理的具有 GPU 的传统系统即使使用批处理也无法有效地执行注意力层。为了解决这种低效率问题，我们首先提出 AttAcc，一种内存处理（PIM）架构，用于高效执行注意力层。随后，为了实现 TbGM 推理的端到端加速，我们提出了一种新颖的异构系统架构和优化，策略性地结合使用 xPU 和 PIM。它利用 AttAcc 的高内存带宽作为注意力层，并利用传统系统强大的计算能力作为 FC 层。最后，我们证明我们的 GPU-PIM 系统优于具有相同内存容量的传统系统，将运行 175B TbGM 的性能和能源效率分别提高了 2.81 倍和 2.67 倍。

items.title: Red-QAOA: Efficient Variational Optimization through Circuit Reduction.
items.abstract:
The Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA) addresses combinatorial optimization challenges by converting inputs to graphs. However, the optimal parameter searching process of QAOA is greatly affected by noise. Larger problems yield bigger graphs, requiring more qubits and making their outcomes highly noise-sensitive. This paper introduces Red-QAOA, leveraging energy landscape concentration via a simulated annealing-based graph reduction.

Red-QAOA creates a smaller ( distilled ) graph with nearly identical parameters to the original graph. The distilled graph produces a smaller quantum circuit and thus reduces noise impact. At the end of the optimization, Red-QAOA employs the parameters from the distilled graph on the original graph and continues the parameter search on the original graph. Red-QAOA outperforms state-of-the-art Graph Neural Network (GNN)-based pooling techniques on 3200 real-world problems. Red-QAOA reduced node and edge counts by 28% and 37%, respectively, with a mean square error of only 2%.
items.abstract_zh:
量子近似优化算法 (QAOA) 通过将输入转换为图形来解决组合优化挑战。然而QAOA的最优参数搜索过程受噪声影响较大。更大的问题会产生更大的图表，需要更多的量子位，并使其结果对噪声高度敏感。本文介绍了 Red-QAOA，通过基于模拟退火的图简化来利用能量景观集中。

Red-QAOA 创建了一个较小的（蒸馏的）图，其参数与原始图几乎相同。蒸馏图产生更小的量子电路，从而减少噪声影响。优化结束时，Red-QAOA 在原始图上采用蒸馏图的参数，并继续在原始图上进行参数搜索。 Red-QAOA 在 3200 个现实问题上的表现优于最先进的基于图神经网络 (GNN) 的池化技术。 Red-QAOA 分别减少了节点数和边数 28% 和 37%，均方误差仅为 2%。

items.title: Elivagar: Efficient Quantum Circuit Search for Classification.
items.abstract:
Designing performant and noise-robust circuits for Quantum Machine Learning (QML) is challenging --- the design space scales exponentially with circuit size, and there are few well-supported guiding principles for QML circuit design. Although recent Quantum Circuit Search (QCS) methods attempt to search for such circuits, they directly adopt designs from classical Neural Architecture Search (NAS) that are misaligned with the unique constraints of quantum hardware, resulting in high search overheads and severe performance bottlenecks.

We present Élivágar, a novel resource-efficient, noise-guided QCS framework. Élivágar innovates in all three major aspects of QCS --- search space, search algorithm and candidate evaluation strategy --- to address the design flaws in current classically-inspired QCS methods. Élivágar achieves hardware-efficiency and avoids an expensive circuit-mapping co-search via noise- and device topology-aware candidate generation. By introducing two cheap-to-compute predictors, Clifford noise resilience and representational capacity , Élivágar decouples the evaluation of noise robustness and performance, enabling early rejection of low-fidelity circuits and reducing circuit evaluation costs. Due to its resource-efficiency, Élivágar can further search for data embeddings, significantly improving performance.

Based on a comprehensive evaluation of Élivágar on 12 real quantum devices and 9 QML applications, Élivágar achieves 5.3% higher accuracy and a 271× speedup compared to state-of-the-art QCS methods.
items.abstract_zh:
为量子机器学习 (QML) 设计高性能且抗噪声的电路具有挑战性——设计空间随着电路尺寸呈指数级增长，而且 QML 电路设计几乎没有得到良好支持的指导原则。尽管最近的量子电路搜索（QCS）方法试图搜索此类电路，但它们直接采用经典神经架构搜索（NAS）的设计，与量子硬件的独特约束不相符，导致较高的搜索开销和严重的性能瓶颈。

我们推出了 Élivágar，一种新颖的资源高效型、噪声引导的 QCS 框架。 Élivágar 在 QCS 的三个主要方面（搜索空间、搜索算法和候选评估策略）进行了创新，以解决当前经典 QCS 方法的设计缺陷。 Élivágar 通过噪声和器件拓扑感知的候选生成实现了硬件效率，并避免了昂贵的电路映射联合搜索。通过引入两个计算成本低廉的预测器 Clifford 噪声恢复力和表征能力，Élivágar 解耦了噪声鲁棒性和性能的评估，从而能够及早拒绝低保真电路并降低电路评估成本。由于其资源效率，Élivágar 可以进一步搜索数据嵌入，从而显着提高性能。

基于对 Élivágar 对 12 个真实量子设备和 9 个 QML 应用的综合评估，与最先进的 QCS 方法相比，Élivágar 的精度提高了 5.3%，加速速度提高了 271 倍。

items.title: Skip It: Take Control of Your Cache!
items.abstract: Mechanisms to explicitly manage the presence of data in caches are fundamental for the correctness and performance of modern systems. These operations, while critical, often incur significant performance penalties even when carefully used. Moreover, these mechanisms are implemented in proprietary and often undocumented hardware, so research into optimizations and novel designs is mostly limited to slow, simplified software simulations. In this paper, we design microarchitectural extensions to support two types of user-controlled cache writebacks to main memory. Furthermore, we propose Skip It, a mechanism built on top of our extensions that substantially reduces redundant writebacks. We implemented these designs on the open-source BOOM out-of-order RISC-V CPU. The performance in hardware is ≈ 100 cycles which favorably compares to similar operations in commercially available server-class platforms. In addition, Skip It performs as well as or better than state-of-the-art software techniques for avoiding unnecessary writebacks.
items.abstract_zh: 显式管理缓存中数据存在的机制对于现代系统的正确性和性能至关重要。这些操作虽然很关键，但即使小心使用，也常常会导致严重的性能损失。此外，这些机制是在专有且通常未记录的硬件中实现的，因此对优化和新颖设计的研究主要局限于缓慢、简化的软件模拟。在本文中，我们设计了微架构扩展来支持两种类型的用户控制的缓存写回主内存。此外，我们提出了 Skip It，这是一种建立在我们的扩展之上的机制，可以大大减少冗余写回。我们在开源 BOOM 乱序 RISC-V CPU 上实现了这些设计。硬件性能约为 100 个周期，与商用服务器级平台中的类似操作相比具有优势。此外，Skip It 的性能与最先进的软件技术一样好，甚至更好，可以避免不必要的写回。

items.title: PyTorch 2: Faster Machine Learning Through Dynamic Python Bytecode Transformation and Graph Compilation.
items.abstract: This paper introduces two extensions to the popular PyTorch machine learning framework, TorchDynamo and TorchInductor, which implement the torch.compile feature released in PyTorch 2. TorchDynamo is a Python-level just-in-time (JIT) compiler that enables graph compilation in PyTorch programs without sacrificing the flexibility of Python. It achieves this by dynamically modifying Python bytecode before execution and extracting sequences of PyTorch operations into an FX graph, which is then JIT compiled using one of many extensible backends. TorchInductor is the default compiler backend for TorchDynamo, which translates PyTorch programs into OpenAI's Triton for GPUs and C++ for CPUs. Results show that TorchDynamo is able to capture graphs more robustly than prior approaches while adding minimal overhead, and TorchInductor is able to provide a 2.27× inference and 1.41× training geometric mean speedup on an NVIDIA A100 GPU across 180+ real-world models, which outperforms six other compilers. These extensions provide a new way to apply optimizations through compilers in eager mode frameworks like PyTorch.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了流行的 PyTorch 机器学习框架的两个扩展，TorchDynamo 和 TorchInductor，它们实现了 PyTorch 2 中发布的 torch.compile 功能。TorchDynamo 是一个 Python 级即时 (JIT) 编译器，可以在 PyTorch 程序中进行图形编译，而无需牺牲 Python 的灵活性。它通过在执行前动态修改 Python 字节码并将 PyTorch 操作序列提取到 FX 图中，然后使用许多可扩展后端之一进行 JIT 编译来实现这一目标。 TorchInductor 是 TorchDynamo 的默认编译器后端，它将 PyTorch 程序转换为 OpenAI 的 GPU 的 Triton 和 CPU 的 C++。结果表明，TorchDynamo 能够比以前的方法更稳健地捕获图形，同时增加最小的开销，而 TorchInductor 能够在 NVIDIA A100 GPU 上跨 180 多个真实模型提供 2.27 倍的推理和 1.41 倍的训练几何平均加速，其性能优于其他六个编译器。这些扩展提供了一种通过 PyTorch 等急切模式框架中的编译器应用优化的新方法。

items.title: Multi-Dimensional and Message-Guided Fuzzing for Robotic Programs in Robot Operating System.
items.abstract:
An increasing number of robotic programs are implemented based on Robot Operating System (ROS), which provides many practical tools and libraries for robot development. To improve robot reliability and security, several recent approaches apply fuzzing to ROS programs for bug detection. However, these approaches still have some main limitations, including inefficient test case generation, ineffective program feedback and weak generality/automation.

In this paper, we design a new fuzzing framework named ROFER, to effectively test robotic programs in ROS for bug detection. Compared to existing ROS fuzzing approaches, ROFER has two novel techniques: (1) a dimension-level mutation method that considers the contribution of each input dimension to testing coverage, to generate efficient test cases from multiple dimensions; (2) a message-guided fuzzing approach that uses a new coverage metric named message feature, to reflect the robot's possible state transitions affected by multiple ROS nodes. We evaluate ROFER on 13 common robotic programs in ROS2, and it finds 88 real bugs, 46 of which have been confirmed by ROS developers. We compare ROFER to four state-of-the-art ROS fuzzing approaches, and it finds more bugs with higher testing coverage.
items.abstract_zh:
越来越多的机器人程序基于机器人操作系统（ROS）来实现，它为机器人开发提供了许多实用的工具和库。为了提高机器人的可靠性和安全性，最近的几种方法将模糊测试应用于 ROS 程序以进行错误检测。然而，这些方法仍然存在一些主要局限性，包括低效的测试用例生成、无效的程序反馈和弱通用性/自动化。

在本文中，我们设计了一个名为 ROFER 的新模糊测试框架，以有效测试 ROS 中的机器人程序以进行错误检测。与现有的ROS模糊方法相比，ROFER有两个新颖的技术：（1）维度级变异方法，考虑每个输入维度对测试覆盖率的贡献，从多个维度生成有效的测试用例； (2)消息引导的模糊测试方法，使用名为消息特征的新覆盖度量来反映机器人受多个ROS节点影响的可能状态转换。我们对 ROS2 中的 13 个常见机器人程序进行了 ROFER 评估，发现了 88 个真正的错误，其中 46 个已被 ROS 开发人员确认。我们将 ROFER 与四种最先进的 ROS 模糊测试方法进行比较，它发现了更多的错误和更高的测试覆盖率。

items.title: Two-Face: Combining Collective and One-Sided Communication for Efficient Distributed SpMM.
items.abstract:
Sparse matrix dense matrix multiplication (SpMM) is commonly used in applications ranging from scientific computing to graph neural networks. Typically, when SpMM is executed in a distributed platform, communication costs dominate. Such costs depend on how communication is scheduled. If it is scheduled in a sparsity-unaware manner, such as with collectives, execution is often inefficient due to unnecessary data transfers. On the other hand, if communication is scheduled in a fine-grained sparsity-aware manner, communicating only the necessary data, execution can also be inefficient due to high software overhead.

We observe that individual sparse matrices often contain regions that are denser and regions that are sparser. Based on this observation, we develop a model that partitions communication into sparsity-unaware and sparsity-aware components. Leveraging the partition, we develop a new algorithm that performs collective communication for the denser regions, and fine-grained, one-sided communication for the sparser regions. We call the algorithm Two-Face. We show that Two-Face attains an average speedup of 2.11x over prior work when evaluated on a 4096-core supercomputer. Additionally, Two-Face scales well with the machine size.
items.abstract_zh:
稀疏矩阵密集矩阵乘法 (SpMM) 常用于从科学计算到图神经网络的各种应用。通常，当 SpMM 在分布式平台中执行时，通信成本占主导地位。此类成本取决于通信的安排方式。如果以稀疏性感知方式（例如集合）进行调度，则由于不必要的数据传输，执行通常效率低下。另一方面，如果以细粒度稀疏感知方式调度通信，仅通信必要的数据，则由于高软件开销，执行也可能效率低下。

我们观察到，各个稀疏矩阵通常包含较稠密的区域和较稀疏的区域。基于这一观察，我们开发了一个模型，将通信分为稀疏感知组件和稀疏感知组件。利用分区，我们开发了一种新算法，可以为较密集的区域执行集体通信，并为较稀疏的区域执行细粒度的单边通信。我们将该算法称为“双面”算法。我们表明，在 4096 核超级计算机上进行评估时，Two-Face 的平均加速比之前的工作提高了 2.11 倍。此外，Two-Face 可以很好地适应机器尺寸。

items.title: One Gate Scheme to Rule Them All: Introducing a Complex Yet Reduced Instruction Set for Quantum Computing.
items.abstract:
The design and architecture of a quantum instruction set are paramount to the performance of a quantum computer. This work introduces a gate scheme for qubits with XX + YY coupling that directly and efficiently realizes any two-qubit gate up to single-qubit gates. First, this scheme enables high-fidelity execution of quantum operations, especially when decoherence is the primary error source. Second, since the scheme spans the entire SU (4) group of two-qubit gates, we can use it to attain the optimal two-qubit gate count for algorithm implementation. These two advantages in synergy give rise to a quantum Complex yet Reduced Instruction Set Computer (CRISC). Though the gate scheme is compact, it supports a comprehensive array of quantum operations. This may seem paradoxical but is realizable due to the fundamental differences between quantum and classical computer architectures.

Using our gate scheme, we observe marked improvements across various applications, including generic n -qubit gate synthesis, quantum volume, and qubit routing. Furthermore, the proposed scheme also realizes a gate locally equivalent to the commonly used CNOT gate with a gate time of π/2 g , where g is the two-qubit coupling. The AshN scheme is also completely impervious to ZZ error, the main coherent error in transversely coupled systems, as the control parameters implementing the gates can be easily adjusted to take the ZZ term into account.
items.abstract_zh:
量子指令集的设计和架构对于量子计算机的性能至关重要。这项工作引入了一种具有 XX + YY 耦合的量子位门方案，可以直接有效地实现任何两量子位门到单量子位门。首先，该方案能够高保真地执行量子运算，特别是当退相干是主要误差源时。其次，由于该方案跨越了整个 SU (4) 组双量子位门，我们可以使用它来获得算法实现的最佳双量子位门计数。这两个优势的协同作用催生了量子复杂精简指令集计算机（CRISC）。尽管门方案很紧凑，但它支持一系列全面的量子操作。这可能看起来很矛盾，但由于量子和经典计算机体系结构之间的根本差异，这是可以实现的。

使用我们的门方案，我们观察到各种应用的显着改进，包括通用 n 量子位门合成、量子体积和量子位路由。此外，所提出的方案还实现了与常用 CNOT 门局部等效的门，其门时间为 π/2 g ，其中 g 是两个量子位耦合。 AshN 方案也完全不受 ZZ 误差（横向耦合系统中的主要相干误差）的影响，因为可以轻松调整实现门的控制参数以考虑 ZZ 项。

items.title: Slapo: A Schedule Language for Progressive Optimization of Large Deep Learning Model Training.
items.abstract:
Recent years have seen an increase in the development of large deep learning (DL) models, which makes training efficiency crucial. Common practice is struggling with the trade-off between usability and performance. On one hand, DL frameworks such as PyTorch use dynamic graphs to facilitate model developers at a price of sub-optimal model training performance. On the other hand, practitioners propose various approaches to improving the training efficiency by sacrificing some of the flexibility, ranging from making the graph static for more thorough optimization (e.g., XLA) to customizing optimization towards large-scale distributed training (e.g., DeepSpeed and Megatron-LM).

In this paper, we aim to address the tension between usability and training efficiency through separation of concerns. Inspired by DL compilers that decouple the platform-specific optimizations of a tensor-level operator from its arithmetic definition, this paper proposes a schedule language, Slapo, to decouple model execution from definition. Specifically, Slapo works on a PyTorch model and uses a set of schedule primitives to convert the model for common model training optimizations such as high-performance kernels, effective 3D parallelism, and efficient activation checkpointing. Compared to existing optimization solutions, Slapo progressively optimizes the model "as-needed" through high-level primitives, and thus preserving programmability and debuggability for users to a large extent. Our evaluation results show that by scheduling the existing hand-crafted optimizations in a systematic way using Slapo, we are able to improve training throughput by up to 2.92× on a single machine with 8 NVIDIA V100 GPUs, and by up to 1.41× on multiple machines with up to 64 GPUs, when compared to the out-of-the-box performance of DeepSpeed and Megatron-LM.
items.abstract_zh:
近年来，大型深度学习（DL）模型的发展不断增加，这使得训练效率变得至关重要。常见的做法是在可用性和性能之间进行权衡。一方面，PyTorch 等深度学习框架使用动态图来方便模型开发人员，但代价是模型训练性能不佳。另一方面，从业者提出了各种通过牺牲一些灵活性来提高训练效率的方法，从使图静态以进行更彻底的优化（例如XLA）到针对大规模分布式训练的定制优化（例如DeepSpeed和Megatron-LM）。

在本文中，我们的目标是通过关注点分离来解决可用性和训练效率之间的紧张关系。受深度学习编译器将张量级运算符的平台特定优化与其算术定义解耦的启发，本文提出了一种调度语言 Slapo，以将模型执行与其定义解耦。具体来说，Slapo 在 PyTorch 模型上工作，并使用一组调度原语将模型转换为常见模型训练优化，例如高性能内核、有效的 3D 并行性和高效的激活检查点。与现有的优化解决方案相比，Slapo通过高级原语“按需”逐步优化模型，从而在很大程度上保留了用户的可编程性和可调试性。我们的评估结果表明，通过使用 Slapo 以系统的方式调度现有的手工优化，与 DeepSpeed 和 Megatron-LM 的开箱即用性能相比，我们能够在具有 8 个 NVIDIA V100 GPU 的单台机器上将训练吞吐量提高高达 2.92 倍，在具有多达 64 个 GPU 的多台机器上提高高达 1.41 倍。

items.title: SEER: Super-Optimization Explorer for High-Level Synthesis using E-graph Rewriting.
items.abstract:
High-level synthesis (HLS) is a process that automatically translates a software program in a high-level language into a low-level hardware description. However, the hardware designs produced by HLS tools still suffer from a significant performance gap compared to manual implementations. This is because the input HLS programs must still be written using hardware design principles.

Existing techniques either leave the program source unchanged or perform a fixed sequence of source transformation passes, potentially missing opportunities to find the optimal design. We propose a super-optimization approach for HLS that automatically rewrites an arbitrary software program into efficient HLS code that can be used to generate an optimized hardware design. We developed a toolflow named SEER, based on the e-graph data structure, to efficiently explore equivalent implementations of a program at scale. SEER provides an extensible framework, orchestrating existing software compiler passes and hardware optimizers.

Our work is the first attempt to exploit e-graph rewriting for large software compiler frameworks, such as MLIR.
