The participating parties must compute on their shares first and then perform data communication to allow the distribution of new secret shares before proceeding to the next computation step. In this work, we show that serialization is unnecessary, particularly in the context of ML computations (both in Convolutional neural networks and in Transformer-based models). We demonstrate that it is possible to carefully orchestrate the computation and communication steps to overlap.

We propose MPC-Pipe, an efficient MPC system for both training and inference of ML workloads, which pipelines computations and communications in an MPC protocol during the online phase. MPC-Pipe proposes three pipeline schemes to optimize the online phase of ML in the semi-honest majority adversary setting. The three pipeline schemes are 1) inter-linear pipeline, 2) inner-layer pipeline, and 3) inter-batch pipeline. Inter-linear pipeline focuses on linear layers; inner-layer pipeline focuses on non-linear layers; inter-batch pipeline focuses on communication and computation overlaps in different input batches. We implement MPC-Pipe by augmenting a modified version of CrypTen, which separates online and offline phases. We evaluate the end-to-end system performance benefits of the online phase of MPC using deep neural networks (VGG16, ResNet50) and Transformers using different network settings. We show that MPC-Pipe can improve the throughput and latency of ML workloads.
items.abstract_zh:
过去几年，多方计算（MPC）作为一种安全计算模型越来越受欢迎。然而，之前的工作已经证明，与明文相比，MPC 协议仍然会带来巨大的性能损失，特别是在应用于 ML 算法时。开销是由于增加的计算和通信成本造成的。之前的研究以及我们自己的分析发现，当今大多数 MPC 协议都按顺序执行通信和计算。参与方必须首先计算其份额，然后进行数据通信以允许分配新的秘密份额，然后再进行下一个计算步骤。在这项工作中，我们证明序列化是不必要的，特别是在 ML 计算的背景下（在卷积神经网络和基于 Transformer 的模型中）。我们证明可以精心安排计算和通信步骤以重叠。

我们提出了 MPC-Pipe，这是一种高效的 MPC 系统，用于 ML 工作负载的训练和推理，它在在线阶段通过 MPC 协议进行计算和通信。 MPC-Pipe 提出了三种管道方案来优化半诚实多数对手设置中的 ML 在线阶段。三种管道方案是1）线间管道、2）内层管道和3）批次间管道。线间管线主要关注线性层；内层管道侧重于非线性层；批次间管道专注于不同输入批次中的通信和计算重叠。我们通过增强 CrypTen 的修改版本来实现 MPC-Pipe，该版本将在线和离线阶段分开。我们使用深度神经网络（VGG16、ResNet50）和使用不同网络设置的 Transformer 评估 MPC 在线阶段的端到端系统性能优势。我们证明 MPC-Pipe 可以提高 ML 工作负载的吞吐量和延迟。

items.title: A Software Caching Runtime for Embedded NVRAM Systems.
items.abstract:
Increasingly sophisticated low-power microcontrollers are at the heart of millions of IoT and edge computing deployments, with developers pushing large-scale data collection, processing, and inference to end nodes. Advanced workloads on resource-constrained systems depend on emerging technologies to meet performance and lifetime demands. High-performance Non-Volatile RAMs (NVRAMs) are one such technology enabling a new class of systems previously made impossible by memory limitations, including ultra-low-power designs using program state non-volatility and sensing systems storing and processing large blocks of data.

Unfortunately, existing NVRAM significantly underperforms SRAM's access latency/energy cost and flash's read performance---condemning systems dependent on NVRAM to pay a steep energy and time penalty for software execution. We observe that this performance penalty stems predominately from instruction fetches into NVRAM, which represent >75% of memory accesses in typical embedded software. To eliminate this performance bottleneck, we propose SwapRAM , a new operating model for NVRAM-based platforms which repurposes underutilized SRAM as an instruction cache, maximizing the proportion of accesses directed towards higher-performance SRAM. SwapRAM consists of a set of compile-time code transformations and a runtime management system that transparently and dynamically copies code into SRAM throughout execution, with an extensible logic to delay eviction of hot code. Across nine embedded benchmarks running on a real FRAM platform, SwapRAM 's software-based design increases execution speed by up to 46% (average 26%) and reduces energy consumption by up to 36% (average 24%) compared to a baseline system using the existing hardware cache.
items.abstract_zh:
日益复杂的低功耗微控制器是数以百万计的物联网和边缘计算部署的核心，开发人员将大规模数据收集、处理和推理推向终端节点。资源受限系统上的高级工作负载依赖于新兴技术来满足性能和生命周期需求。高性能非易失性 RAM (NVRAM) 就是这样一种技术，可实现以前因内存限制而无法实现的新型系统，包括使用程序状态非易失性的超低功耗设计以及存储和处理大数据块的传感系统。

不幸的是，现有 NVRAM 的访问延迟/能源成本和闪存的读取性能明显低于 SRAM，这使得依赖 NVRAM 的系统必须为软件执行付出高昂的能源和时间代价。我们观察到，这种性能损失主要源于 NVRAM 中的指令提取，这代表了典型嵌入式软件中超过 75% 的内存访问。为了消除这一性能瓶颈，我们提出了 SwapRAM，这是一种针对基于 NVRAM 的平台的新操作模型，它将未充分利用的 SRAM 重新用作指令缓存，从而最大限度地提高针对高性能 SRAM 的访问比例。 SwapRAM 由一组编译时代码转换和一个运行时管理系统组成，该系统在整个执行过程中透明且动态地将代码复制到 SRAM 中，并具有可扩展逻辑来延迟热代码的驱逐。在真实 FRAM 平台上运行的九个嵌入式基准测试中，与使用现有硬件缓存的基准系统相比，SwapRAM 基于软件的设计将执行速度提高了高达 46%（平均 26%），并将能耗降低了高达 36%（平均 24%）。

items.title: Validating JVM Compilers via Maximizing Optimization Interactions.
items.abstract: This paper introduces the concept of optimization interaction, which refers to the practice in modern compilers where multiple optimization phases, such as inlining, loop unrolling , and dead code elimination , are not completed in a one-off sequential order while being interacted instead. Therefore, while optimizing a certain phase, the compiler needs to ensure that the results of other optimization phases will not be disrupted, as this could lead to compiler crashes or unpredictable results. To verify whether compilers can correctly handle the optimization process across various phases, we propose MopFuzzer, which aims at maximizing runtime optimization interactions during fuzzing. Specifically, it encourages the JVM to perform multi-stage optimizations and verifies the correctness of the compiler's optimized code through differential testing. Currently, MopFuzzer has implemented 13 mutators, and each is intended to trigger a certain optimization behavior. Such mutators are applied iteratively to the same program point, aiming to maximize optimization interactions. Subsequently, the testing process is guided by a novel method based on profile data, which records the optimization behaviors performed by the compiler. The guidance enables MopFuzzer to generate mutants that are able to maximize optimization behaviors and their interactions. Our evaluation has led to 59 bug reports for widely used production JVMs, OpenJDK and OpenJ9.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了优化交互的概念，它是指现代编译器中的实践，多个优化阶段，例如内联、循环展开和死代码消除，并不是一次性完成的，而是交互的。因此，编译器在优化某个阶段的同时，需要确保其他优化阶段的结果不会受到干扰，否则可能会导致编译器崩溃或出现不可预测的结果。为了验证编译器是否能够正确处理各个阶段的优化过程，我们提出了 MopFuzzer，其旨在最大化模糊测试期间的运行时优化交互。具体来说，它鼓励JVM进行多阶段优化，并通过差异测试来验证编译器优化代码的正确性。目前，MopFuzzer 已经实现了 13 个变异器，每个变异器都旨在触发某种优化行为。这些变异器迭代地应用于同一程序点，旨在最大化优化交互。随后，测试过程由基于配置文件数据的新颖方法指导，该方法记录编译器执行的优化行为。该指导使 MopFuzzer 能够生成能够最大化优化行为及其相互作用的突变体。我们的评估针对广泛使用的生产 JVM、OpenJDK 和 OpenJ9 生成了 59 个错误报告。

items.title: VertexSurge: Variable Length Graph Pattern Match on Billion-edge Graphs.
items.abstract:
Variable-Length Graph Pattern Matching (VLGPM) is a critical functionality in graph databases, pivotal for identifying patterns where the number of connecting edges between two matched vertices is variable. This function plays a vital role in analyzing complex and dynamic networks such as social networks or bank transfers networks, where relationships can vary extensively in both length and structure. However, despite its importance, current graph databases, optimized primarily for single-hop subgraph matching, struggle with VLGPM over large graphs.

To bridge this gap between essential user requirements and the lack of efficient support in existing systems, we introduce VertexSurge. Central to VertexSurge is an innovative variable-length expand (VExpand) operator, which incorporates several microarchitecture-friendly optimizations to efficiently compute the reachability matrix between two sets of vertices. These optimizations enable VertexSurge to handle the surge of vertex count due to variable length with high performance. Additionally, VertexSurge combines VExpand with effective multi-set intersection for pattern matching, ruled-based planning, and disk offloading for large datasets, to implement a full-fledged VLGPM engine. Our evaluations with real-world graph datasets and representative patterns demonstrate that VertexSurge significantly outperforms existing systems in VLGPM, validating its efficacy in handling large-scale graph pattern matching challenges.
items.abstract_zh:
可变长度图模式匹配（VLGPM）是图数据库中的一项关键功能，对于识别两个匹配顶点之间的连接边数量可变的模式至关重要。此函数在分析社交网络或银行转账网络等复杂动态网络中发挥着至关重要的作用，这些网络中的关系在长度和结构上都有很大差异。然而，尽管它很重要，当前的图数据库主要针对单跳子图匹配进行了优化，但在大型图上却难以应对 VLGPM。

为了弥合基本用户需求与现有系统缺乏有效支持之间的差距，我们引入了 VertexSurge。 VertexSurge 的核心是一个创新的可变长度扩展 (VExpand) 运算符，它结合了多个微架构友好的优化，可有效计算两组顶点之间的可达性矩阵。这些优化使 VertexSurge 能够以高性能处理由于可变长度而导致的顶点数激增。此外，VertexSurge 将 VExpand 与有效的多集交集相结合，用于模式匹配、基于规则的规划和大型数据集的磁盘卸载，以实现成熟的 VLGPM 引擎。我们对真实世界图形数据集和代表性模式的评估表明，VertexSurge 显着优于 VLGPM 中的现有系统，验证了其在处理大规模图形模式匹配挑战方面的功效。

items.title: Manta: Hybrid-Sensitive Type Inference Toward Type-Assisted Bug Detection for Stripped Binaries.
items.abstract: Static binary bug detection has been a prominent approach for ensuring the security of binaries used in our daily lives. However, the type information lost in binaries prevents the improvement opportunity for a static analyzer to utilize type information to prune away infeasible facts and increase analysis precision. To make binary bug detection more practical with higher precision, in this work, we propose the first hybrid-sensitive type inference, Manta, that combines data-flow analysis with different sensitivities to complement each other and infer precise types for many variables. The inferred types are then used to assist with bug detection by pruning infeasible indirect call targets and data dependencies. Our experiments indicate Manta outperforms prior work by inferring types with 78.7% precision and 97.2% recall. Based on the inferred types, we can prune away 63.9% more infeasible indirect-call targets compared to existing type analysis techniques and perform program slicing on binaries with 61.1% similarity to that on source code. Moreover, Manta has led to 86 new developer-confirmed vulnerabilities in many popular IoT firmware, with 64 CVE/PSV IDs assigned.
items.abstract_zh: 静态二进制错误检测一直是确保我们日常生活中使用的二进制文件安全的一种重要方法。然而，二进制文件中丢失的类型信息阻碍了静态分析器利用类型信息删除不可行的事实并提高分析精度的改进机会。为了使二进制错误检测更实用、更高精度，在这项工作中，我们提出了第一个混合敏感类型推断 Manta，它将数据流分析与不同灵敏度相结合，相互补充并推断出许多变量的精确类型。然后，推断的类型用于通过修剪不可行的间接调用目标和数据依赖性来协助错误检测。我们的实验表明，Manta 的类型推断精度为 78.7%，召回率为 97.2%，优于之前的工作。基于推断的类型，与现有类型分析技术相比，我们可以删除 63.9% 的不可行间接调用目标，并对二进制文件执行程序切片，与源代码的相似度为 61.1%。此外，Manta 在许多流行的物联网固件中导致了 86 个开发人员确认的新漏洞，并分配了 64 个 CVE/PSV ID。

items.title: Hassert: Hardware Assertion-Based Verification Framework with FPGA Acceleration.
items.abstract:
Hardware verification is typically the bottleneck of the chip development cycle, mainly due to the time-consuming simulation and debugging process using software simulators. Assertion-Based Verification (ABV) has been widely adopted to provide better visibility into microarchitecture details and automatically detect unexpected behaviors. While ABV significantly improves verification efficiency, checking assertions using software simulators requires extremely long times for large benchmarks. Prototyping designs on an FPGA is a potential alternative to verify hardware, but it lacks fine-grained debugging capabilities for when errors occur.

To address these challenges, we present Hassert, an efficient ABV framework that combines high-performance verification on FPGAs with fine-grained debugging in software. Hassert automates the scheduling and mapping of SystemVerilog Assertions (SVAs) to the available FPGA fabric with the design-under-test (DUT), allowing for extensive hardware testing. Hassert also enables dynamic switching between different assertions, either user-specified or based on SVA coverage satisfaction, by partially reconfiguring the FPGA at runtime, eliminating the need to recompile the DUT.

To further improve debugging efficiency, we also propose a microarchitecture-guided hardware snapshot scheme. If any assertion is fired, Hassert automatically generates snapshots of the current status of the entire FPGA hardware. These snapshots are then transferred to an external simulator, where the operation is reconstructed in software for further debugging. We demonstrate that these contributions can improve significant verification efficiency over traditional software simulation-based approaches for various hardware benchmarks and RISC-V processor designs whilst maintaining full visibility and debugging capabilities at the cost of only a small area overhead.
items.abstract_zh:
硬件验证通常是芯片开发周期的瓶颈，主要是由于使用软件模拟器进行耗时的模拟和调试过程。基于断言的验证 (ABV) 已被广泛采用，以提供对微架构细节的更好可见性并自动检测意外行为。虽然 ABV 显着提高了验证效率，但使用软件模拟器检查断言对于大型基准测试来说需要极长的时间。 FPGA 上的原型设计是验证硬件的潜在替代方案，但它缺乏针对发生错误时的细粒度调试功能。

为了应对这些挑战，我们推出了 Hassert，这是一种高效的 ABV 框架，它将 FPGA 上的高性能验证与软件中的细粒度调试相结合。 Hassert 通过被测设计 (DUT) 自动调度和映射 SystemVerilog 断言 (SVA) 到可用的 FPGA 结构，从而允许进行广泛的硬件测试。 Hassert 还可以通过在运行时部分重新配置 FPGA，实现不同断言之间的动态切换（用户指定或基于 SVA 覆盖满意度），从而无需重新编译 DUT。

为了进一步提高调试效率，我们还提出了微架构引导的硬件快照方案。如果触发任何断言，Hassert 会自动生成整个 FPGA 硬件当前状态的快照。然后，这些快照被传输到外部模拟器，在软件中重建操作以进行进一步调试。我们证明，与传统的基于软件模拟的方法相比，这些贡献可以显着提高各种硬件基准和 RISC-V 处理器设计的验证效率，同时仅以很小的面积开销为代价保持完整的可见性和调试功能。

items.title: FastGL: A GPU-Efficient Framework for Accelerating Sampling-Based GNN Training at Large Scale.
items.abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have shown great superiority on non-Euclidean graph data, achieving ground-breaking performance on various graph-related tasks. As a practical solution to train GNN on large graphs with billions of nodes and edges, the sampling-based training is widely adopted by existing training frameworks. However, through an in-depth analysis, we observe that the efficiency of existing sampling-based training frameworks is still limited due to the key bottlenecks lying in all three phases of sampling-based training, i.e., subgraph sample, memory IO, and computation. To this end, we propose FastGL , a GPU-efficient F ramework for a ccelerating s ampling-based t raining of G NN at L arge scale by simultaneously optimizing all above three phases, taking into account both GPU characteristics and graph structure. Specifically, by exploiting the inherent overlap within graph structures, FastGL develops the Match-Reorder strategy to reduce the data traffic, which accelerates the memory IO without incurring any GPU memory overhead. Additionally, FastGL leverages a Memory-Aware computation method, harnessing the GPU memory's hierarchical nature to mitigate irregular data access during computation. FastGL further incorporates the Fused-Map approach aimed at diminishing the synchronization overhead during sampling. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FastGL can achieve an average speedup of 11.8×, 2.2× and 1.5× over the state-of-the-art frameworks PyG, DGL, and GNNLab, respectively. Our code is available at https://github.com/a1bc2def6g/fastgl-ae.
items.abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）在非欧几里得图数据上表现出了巨大的优越性，在各种与图相关的任务上实现了突破性的性能。作为在具有数十亿节点和边的大型图上训练 GNN 的实用解决方案，基于采样的训练被现有的训练框架广泛采用。然而，通过深入分析，我们发现现有的基于采样的训练框架的效率仍然有限，因为基于采样的训练的三个阶段都存在关键瓶颈，即子图样本、内存IO和计算。为此，我们提出了 FastGL，一种 GPU 高效框架，通过同时优化上述三个阶段，同时考​​虑 GPU 特性和图结构，用于大规模基于加速采样的 G NN 训练。具体来说，通过利用图结构中固有的重叠，FastGL 开发了 Match-Reorder 策略来减少数据流量，从而加速内存 IO，而不会产生任何 GPU 内存开销。此外，FastGL 利用内存感知计算方法，利用 GPU 内存的分层性质来减少计算期间的不规则数据访问。 FastGL 进一步结合了 Fused-Map 方法，旨在减少采样期间的同步开销。大量实验表明，与最先进的框架 PyG、DGL 和 GNNLab 相比，FastGL 的平均加速分别为 11.8 倍、2.2 倍和 1.5 倍。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/a1bc2def6g/fastgl-ae 获取。

items.title: Salus: A Practical Trusted Execution Environment for CPU-FPGA Heterogeneous Cloud Platforms.
items.abstract: CPU-FPGA heterogeneous architectures have become increasingly popular in cloud environments for accelerating compute-intensive tasks. Ensuring the protection of sensitive data processed by these architectures requires the presence of a trusted execution environment (TEE). This work highlights the requirements for designing an FPGA TEE, the challenges faced in deploying existing solutions on commercial-off-the-shelf (COTS) cloud FPGA services, and the limitations of previous works that primarily focus on standalone FPGA TEEs. In response to these challenges, Salus introduces an innovative approach by leveraging an enclave running on the host with a TEE-enabled CPU. This approach aims to protect and attest the bitstream loaded on the FPGA side. By repurposing COTS FPGA bitstream utilities in a novel manner and adopting a proposed security-enhanced FPGA IP, Salus presents a practical design for an FPGA TEE, with minor efforts required.
items.abstract_zh: CPU-FPGA 异构架构在云环境中越来越流行，用于加速计算密集型任务。确保保护这些架构处理的敏感数据需要存在可信执行环境（TEE）。这项工作强调了设计 FPGA TEE 的要求、在商用现成 (COTS) 云 FPGA 服务上部署现有解决方案所面临的挑战，以及之前主要关注独立 FPGA TEE 的工作的局限性。为了应对这些挑战，Salus 引入了一种创新方法，利用在具有 TEE 功能的 CPU 的主机上运行的 enclave。该方法旨在保护和验证 FPGA 端加载的比特流。通过以新颖的方式重新利用 COTS FPGA 比特流实用程序并采用拟议的安全增强型 FPGA IP，Salus 提出了 FPGA TEE 的实用设计，只需少量工作。

items.title: Explainable Port Mapping Inference with Sparse Performance Counters for AMD's Zen Architectures.
items.abstract:
Performance models are instrumental for optimizing performance-sensitive code. When modeling the use of functional units of out-of-order x86-64 CPUs, data availability varies by the manufacturer: Instruction-to-port mappings for Intel's processors are available, whereas information for AMD's designs are lacking. The reason for this disparity is that standard techniques to infer exact port mappings require hardware performance counters that AMD does not provide.

In this work, we modify the port mapping inference algorithm of the widely used uops.info project to not rely on Intel's performance counters. The modifications are based on a formal port mapping model with a counter-example-guided algorithm powered by an SMT solver. We investigate in how far AMD's processors comply with this model and where unexpected performance characteristics prevent an accurate port mapping. Our results provide valuable insights for creators of CPU performance models as well as for software developers who want to achieve peak performance on recent AMD CPUs.
items.abstract_zh:
性能模型有助于优化性能敏感的代码。当对乱序 x86-64 CPU 的功能单元的使用进行建模时，数据可用性因制造商而异：英特尔处理器的指令到端口映射可用，而 AMD 设计的信息则缺乏。造成这种差异的原因是推断精确端口映射的标准技术需要 AMD 不提供的硬件性能计数器。

在这项工作中，我们修改了广泛使用的uops.info项目的端口映射推理算法，使其不依赖于英特尔的性能计数器。这些修改基于正式的端口映射模型，以及由 SMT 求解器支持的反例引导算法。我们调查 AMD 处理器在多大程度上符合此模型，以及哪些意外的性能特征妨碍了准确的端口映射。我们的结果为 CPU 性能模型的创建者以及希望在最新 AMD CPU 上实现峰值性能的软件开发人员提供了宝贵的见解。

items.title: Promatch: Extending the Reach of Real-Time Quantum Error Correction with Adaptive Predecoding.
items.abstract:
Fault-tolerant quantum computing relies on Quantum Error Correction (QEC) , which encodes logical qubits into data and parity qubits. Error decoding is the process of translating the measured parity bits into types and locations of errors. To prevent a backlog of errors, error decoding must be performed in real-time (i.e., within 1 μs on superconducting machines). Minimum Weight Perfect Matching (MWPM) is an accurate decoding algorithm for surface code, and recent research has demonstrated real-time implementations of MWPM (RT-MWPM) for a distance of up to 9. Unfortunately, beyond d=9, the number of flipped parity bits in the syndrome, referred to as the Hamming weight of the syndrome, exceeds the capabilities of existing RT-MWPM decoders. In this work, our goal is to enable larger distance RT-MWPM decoders by using adaptive predecoding that converts high Hamming weight syndromes into low Hamming weight syndromes, which are accurately decoded by the RT-MWPM decoder.

An effective predecoder must balance both accuracy (as any erroneous decoding by the predecoder contributes to the overall Logical Error Rate, termed as LER) and coverage (as the predecoder must ensure that the hamming weight of the syndrome is within the capability of the final decoder). In this paper, we propose Promatch, a real-time adaptive predecoder that predecodes both simple and complex patterns using a locality-aware, greedy approach. Our approach ensures two crucial factors: 1) high accuracy in prematching flipped bits, ensuring that the decoding accuracy is not hampered by the predecoder, and 2) enough coverage adjusted based on the main decoder's capability given the time constraints. Promatch represents the first real-time decoding framework capable of decoding surface codes of distances 11 and 13, achieving an LER of 2.6 × 10 -14 for distance 13. Moreover, we demonstrate that running Promatch concurrently with the recently proposed Astrea-G achieves LER equivalent to MWPM LER, 3.4 × 10 -15 , for distance 13, representing the first real-time accurate decoder for up-to a distance of 13.
items.abstract_zh:
容错量子计算依赖于量子纠错（QEC），它将逻辑量子位编码为数据和奇偶校验量子位。错误解码是将测量到的奇偶校验位转换为错误类型和位置的过程。为了防止错误积压，必须实时执行错误解码（即在超导机器上在 1 μs 内）。最小权重完美匹配 (MWPM) 是一种针对表面代码的精确解码算法，最近的研究证明了 MWPM (RT-MWPM) 的实时实现距离可达 9。不幸的是，超过 d=9，校正子中翻转奇偶校验位的数量（称为校正子的汉明权重）超出了现有 RT-MWPM 解码器的能力。在这项工作中，我们的目标是通过使用自适应预解码来实现更远距离的 RT-MWPM 解码器，该预解码将高汉明权值综合症转换为低汉明权值综合症，并由 RT-MWPM 解码器准确解码。

有效的预解码器必须平衡准确性（因为预解码器的任何错误解码都会导致整体逻辑错误率，称为 LER）和覆盖范围（因为预解码器必须确保校正子的汉明权重在最终解码器的能力范围内）。在本文中，我们提出了 Promatch，一种实时自适应预解码器，它使用局部感知的贪婪方法对简单和复杂的模式进行预解码。我们的方法确保了两个关键因素：1）预匹配翻转位的高精度，确保解码精度不受预解码器的阻碍；2）在给定时间限制的情况下，根据主解码器的能力调整足够的覆盖范围。 Promatch 代表了第一个能够解码距离 11 和 13 的表面码的实时解码框架，实现了距离 13 的 2.6 × 10 -14 的 LER。此外，我们证明，与最近提出的 Astrea-G 同时运行 Promatch 可以实现与距离 13 的 MWPM LER 3.4 × 10 -15 等效的 LER，代表第一个距离可达 13 的实时精确解码器。

items.title: SlimSLAM: An Adaptive Runtime for Visual-Inertial Simultaneous Localization and Mapping.
items.abstract:
Simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) algorithms track an agent's movements through an unknown environment. SLAM must be fast and accurate to avoid adverse effects such as motion sickness in AR/VR headsets and navigation errors in autonomous robots and drones. However, accurate SLAM is computationally expensive and target platforms are often highly constrained. Therefore, to maintain real-time functionality, designers must either pay a large up-front cost to design specialized accelerators or reduce the algorithm's functionality, resulting in poor pose estimation.

We find that most SLAM algorithms are statically configured for the worst-case input and mismanage their computation budget. Thus, we present SlimSLAM, a domain-specific runtime scheduler which adapts SLAM algorithmic parameters based on input needs, minimizing computation while maintaining accuracy. SlimSLAM exploits information from a SLAM algorithm's state to detect and adjust over-provisioned parameters in real-time. We demonstrate SlimSLAM on the state-of-the-art real-time visual-inertial SLAM algorithm: HybVIO. We show that SlimSLAM is able to provide speedups up to 5.4× on the EuRoC, TUM-VI Room, and Monado VR datasets and outperforms other adaptive approaches on average by 2.3×-1.3× with iso-accuracy. This enables more accurate SLAM on constrained computation platforms such as the Raspberry Pi 4 (RPi4) where SlimSLAM is faster and more accurate than both HybVIO's static RPi4 configuration as well as other SLAM algorithms.
items.abstract_zh:
同步定位与建图 (SLAM) 算法可跟踪代理在未知环境中的移动。 SLAM 必须快速且准确，以避免 AR/VR 耳机中的晕动病以及自主机器人和无人机中的导航错误等不利影响。然而，准确的 SLAM 计算成本很高，而且目标平台通常受到高度限制。因此，为了保持实时功能，设计人员必须支付大量的前期成本来设计专用加速器，或者减少算法的功能，从而导致姿态估计效果不佳。

我们发现大多数 SLAM 算法都是针对最坏情况的输入进行静态配置，并且对计算预算的管理不善。因此，我们提出了 SlimSLAM，这是一种特定领域的运行时调度程序，它根据输入需求调整 SLAM 算法参数，在保持准确性的同时最大限度地减少计算量。 SlimSLAM 利用来自 SLAM 算法状态的信息来实时检测和调整过度配置的参数。我们在最先进的实时视觉惯性 SLAM 算法：HybVIO 上演示了 SlimSLAM。我们表明，SlimSLAM 能够在 EuRoC、TUM-VI Room 和 Monado VR 数据集上提供高达 5.4 倍的加速，并且在等精度下平均优于其他自适应方法 2.3 倍-1.3 倍。这使得在 Raspberry Pi 4 (RPi4) 等受限计算平台上实现更准确的 SLAM，其中 SlimSLAM 比 HybVIO 的静态 RPi4 配置以及其他 SLAM 算法更快、更准确。

items.title: A shared compilation stack for distributed-memory parallelism in stencil DSLs.
items.abstract: Domain Specific Languages (DSLs) increase programmer productivity and provide high performance. Their targeted abstractions allow scientists to express problems at a high level, providing rich details that optimizing compilers can exploit to target current- and next-generation supercomputers. The convenience and performance of DSLs come with significant development and maintenance costs. The siloed design of DSL compilers and the resulting inability to benefit from shared infrastructure cause uncertainties around longevity and the adoption of DSLs at scale. By tailoring the broadly-adopted MLIR compiler framework to HPC, we bring the same synergies that the machine learning community already exploits across their DSLs (e.g. Tensorflow, PyTorch) to the finite-difference stencil HPC community. We introduce new HPC-specific abstractions for message passing targeting distributed stencil computations. We demonstrate the sharing of common components across three distinct HPC stencil-DSL compilers: Devito, PSyclone, and the Open Earth Compiler, showing that our framework generates high-performance executables based upon a shared compiler ecosystem.
items.abstract_zh: 领域特定语言 (DSL) 提高程序员的工作效率并提供高性能。他们有针对性的抽象使科学家能够在高层次上表达问题，提供丰富的细节，优化编译器可以利用这些细节来瞄准当前和下一代超级计算机。 DSL 的便利性和性能伴随着巨大的开发和维护成本。 DSL 编译器的孤立设计以及由此导致的无法从共享基础设施中受益，导致了 DSL 的寿命和大规模采用方面的不确定性。通过针对 HPC 定制广泛采用的 MLIR 编译器框架，我们将机器学习社区已经在其 DSL（例如 Tensorflow、PyTorch）中利用的协同效应引入有限差分模板 HPC 社区。我们引入了新的 HPC 特定抽象，用于针对分布式模板计算的消息传递。我们演示了三个不同 HPC stencil-DSL 编译器（Devito、PSyclone 和 Open Earth Compiler）之间的通用组件的共享，表明我们的框架基于共享编译器生态系统生成高性能可执行文件。

items.title: AWS Trainium: The Journey for Designing and Optimization Full Stack ML Hardware.
items.abstract: Machine learning accelerators present a unique set of design challenges across chip architecture, instruction set, server design, compiler, and both inter- and intra-chip connectivity. With AWS Trainium, we've utilized AWS's end-to-end ownership from chip to server, network, compilers, and runtime tools to collaboratively design and optimize across all layers, emphasizing simplicity and ease of use. This talk will illustrate the design principles, tradeoffs, and lessons learned during the development of three generations of AWS ML products, from conceptualization to placing systems in the hands of AWS customers.
items.abstract_zh: 机器学习加速器在芯片架构、指令集、服务器设计、编译器以及芯片间和芯片内连接方面提出了一系列独特的设计挑战。借助 AWS Trainium，我们利用 AWS 的从芯片到服务器、网络、编译器和运行时工具的端到端所有权来跨所有层进行协作设计和优化，强调简单性和易用性。本次演讲将阐述三代 AWS ML 产品开发过程中的设计原则、权衡和经验教训，从概念化到将系统交付给 AWS 客户。

items.title: GMT: GPU Orchestrated Memory Tiering for the Big Data Era.
items.abstract: As the demand for processing larger datasets increases, GPUs need to reach deeper into their (memory) hierarchy to directly access capacities that only storage systems (SSDs) can hold. However, the state-of-the-art mechanisms to reach storage either employ software stacks running on the host CPUs as intermediaries (e.g. Dragon, HMM), which has been noted to perform poorly and not able to meet the throughput needs of GPU cores, or directly access SSDs through NVMe queues (BaM) which does not benefit from lower latencies that may be possible by having the host memory as an intermediate tier. This paper presents the design and implementation of GPU Memory Tiering ( GMT ) by implementing a GPU-orchestrated 3-tier hierarchy comprising GPU memory, host memory and SSDs, where the GPU orchestrates most of the transfers that are bandwidth/latency sensitive. Additionally, it is important to not blindly transfer pages from the GPU memory to host memory upon an eviction, and GMT employs a reuse-prediction based practical insertion policy to perform discretionary page placement/bypass. An implementation and evaluation on an actual platform demonstrates that GMT performs 50% better than the state-of-the-art 2-tier strategy (BaM) and over 350% better than the state-of-the-art 3-tier strategy that is orchestrated by host CPUs (HMM), over a number of GPU applications with diverse memory access characteristics.
items.abstract_zh: 随着处理更大数据集的需求增加，GPU 需要更深入地了解其（内存）层次结构，以直接访问只有存储系统 (SSD) 才能容纳的容量。然而，最先进的存储访问机制要么采用在主机 CPU 上运行的软件堆栈作为中介（例如 Dragon、HMM），但众所周知，这种方式性能较差且无法满足 GPU 核心的吞吐量需求；或者通过 NVMe 队列 (BaM) 直接访问 SSD，但这种方式无法从通过将主机内存作为中间层可能实现的较低延迟中获益。本文通过实现由 GPU 内存、主机内存和 SSD 组成的 GPU 协调的 3 层层次结构来介绍 GPU 内存分层 (GMT) 的设计和实现，其中 GPU 协调大部分对带宽/延迟敏感的传输。此外，重要的是，在驱逐时不要盲目地将页面从 GPU 内存传输到主机内存，并且 GMT 采用基于重用预测的实用插入策略来执行酌情页面放置/旁路。在实际平台上的实现和评估表明，在许多具有不同内存访问特性的 GPU 应用程序中，GMT 的性能比最先进的 2 层策略 (BaM) 好 50%，比最先进的由主机 CPU 编排的 3 层策略 (HMM) 好 350% 以上。

items.title: MAGIS: Memory Optimization via Coordinated Graph Transformation and Scheduling for DNN.
items.abstract:
Recently, memory consumption of Deep Neural Network (DNN) rapidly increases, mainly due to long lifetimes and large shapes of tensors. Graph scheduling has emerged as an effective memory optimization technique, which determines the optimal execution, re-computation, swap-out, and swap-in timings for each operator/tensor. However, it often hurts performance significantly and can only manipulate tensors' lifetimes but not shapes, limiting the optimization space. We find that graph transformation, which can change the tensor shapes and graph structure, creates a new trade-off space between memory and performance. Nevertheless, graph transformation are applied separately so far, with primary focus on optimizing performance and not memory.

In this paper, we propose MAGIS, a DNN memory optimization framework that coordinates graph transformation with graph scheduling. MAGIS uses a hierarchical tree to represent Fission Transformation (F-Trans), a type of transformation which can effectively reduce tensor shapes in a sub-graph. To keep the complexity low, we build a light-weight search space based on graph structure analysis. MAGIS decomposes graph scheduling into graph transformation and re-ordering and designs an incremental scheduling algorithm to alleviate the scheduling overhead after each graph transformation step to efficiently coordinate them. Experimental results show that compared to state-of-the-art works, MAGIS only uses 15%~85% of their peak memory usage with the same latency 1 constraint and obtains a better Pareto boundary in dual-objective optimization of memory and performance. Our code is now available at https://github.com/pku-liang/MAGIS.
items.abstract_zh:
最近，深度神经网络（DNN）的内存消耗迅速增加，这主要是由于张量的寿命长和形状大。图调度已成为一种有效的内存优化技术，它确定每个运算符/张量的最佳执行、重新计算、换出和换入时序。然而，它通常会严重损害性能，并且只能操纵张量的寿命而不能操纵形状，从而限制了优化空间。我们发现图变换可以改变张量形状和图结构，在内存和性能之间创建了一个新的权衡空间。尽管如此，到目前为止，图转换都是单独应用的，主要关注的是优化性能而不是内存。

在本文中，我们提出了 MAGIS，一种协调图转换和图调度的 DNN 内存优化框架。 MAGIS 使用分层树来表示裂变变换（F-Trans），这是一种可以有效减少子图中张量形状的变换。为了保持较低的复杂性，我们基于图结构分析构建了一个轻量级搜索空间。 MAGIS将图调度分解为图变换和重新排序，并设计了增量调度算法来减轻每个图变换步骤之后的调度开销，从而有效地协调它们。实验结果表明，与最先进的作品相比，MAGIS 在相同的延迟 1 约束下仅使用了峰值内存使用量的 15%~85%，并在内存和性能的双目标优化中获得了更好的 Pareto 边界。我们的代码现已在 https://github.com/pku-liang/MAGIS 上提供。

items.title: EVT: Accelerating Deep Learning Training with Epilogue Visitor Tree.
items.abstract:
As deep learning models become increasingly complex, the deep learning compilers are critical for enhancing the system efficiency and unlocking hidden optimization opportunities. Although excellent speedups have been achieved in inference workloads, existing compilers face significant limitations in training. Firstly, the training computation graph involves intricate operations challenging to fuse, such as normalization, loss functions, and reductions, which limit optimization opportunities like kernel fusion. Secondly, the training graph's additional edges connecting forward and backward operators pose challenges in finding optimal and feasible partitions for kernel fusion. More importantly, existing compilers cannot either generate kernels with state-of-the-art performance on modern GPUs or accommodate diverse fusion patterns.

In this paper, we introduce Epilogue Visitor Tree (EVT), a novel compiler that overcomes these limitations. EVT employs novel graph-level compilation passes to unlock hidden fusion and optimization opportunities. It also incorporates a novel integer linear programming-based partitioner that efficiently solves the optimal and feasible partitions in complex joint forward-backward graphs. Moreover, we present the Epilogue Visitor Abstraction and introduce the EVT operator compiler that automatically generates flexible epilogues that can be integrated with high-performance main loop implementations from CUTLASS and other SOTA libraries. EVT is evaluated on diverse training workloads across domains and achieves 1.26~3.1× speedup.
items.abstract_zh:
随着深度学习模型变得越来越复杂，深度学习编译器对于提高系统效率和释放隐藏的优化机会至关重要。尽管推理工作负载实现了出色的加速，但现有编译器在训练方面面临重大限制。首先，训练计算图涉及难以融合的复杂操作，例如归一化、损失函数和归约，这限制了核融合等优化机会。其次，训练图连接前向和后向算子的附加边对寻找核融合的最佳且可行的分区提出了挑战。更重要的是，现有编译器既无法在现代 GPU 上生成具有最先进性能的内核，也无法适应不同的融合模式。

在本文中，我们介绍了 Epilogue Visitor Tree (EVT)，这是一种克服这些限制的新颖编译器。 EVT 采用新颖的图形级编译通道来解锁隐藏的融合和优化机会。它还采用了一种新颖的基于整数线性规划的分区器，可以有效地解决复杂联合前向-后向图中的最优和可行分区。此外，我们还介绍了 Epilogue Visitor Abstraction 并引入了 EVT 运算符编译器，该编译器可自动生成灵活的尾声，这些尾声可以与 CUTLASS 和其他 SOTA 库的高性能主循环实现集成。 EVT 在跨领域的不同训练工作负载上进行评估，并实现 1.26~3.1 倍的加速。

items.title: Centauri: Enabling Efficient Scheduling for Communication-Computation Overlap in Large Model Training via Communication Partitioning.
items.abstract:
Efficiently training large language models (LLMs) necessitates the adoption of hybrid parallel methods, integrating multiple communications collectives within distributed partitioned graphs. Overcoming communication bottlenecks is crucial and is often achieved through communication and computation overlaps. However, existing overlap methodologies tend to lean towards either fine-grained kernel fusion or limited operation scheduling, constraining performance optimization in heterogeneous training environments.

This paper introduces Centauri , an innovative framework that encompasses comprehensive communication partitioning and hierarchical scheduling schemes for optimized overlap. We propose a partition space comprising three inherent abstraction dimensions: primitive substitution, topology-aware group partitioning, and workload partitioning. These dimensions collectively create a comprehensive optimization space for efficient overlap. To determine the efficient overlap of communication and computation operators, we decompose the scheduling tasks in hybrid parallel training into three hierarchical tiers: operation, layer, and model. Through these techniques, Centauri effectively overlaps communication latency and enhances hardware utilization. Evaluation results demonstrate that Centauri achieves up to 1.49× speedup over prevalent methods across various parallel training configurations.
items.abstract_zh:
有效训练大型语言模型 (LLM) 需要采用混合并行方法，将多个通信集合集成到分布式分区图中。克服通信瓶颈至关重要，通常是通过通信和计算重叠来实现的。然而，现有的重叠方法往往倾向于细粒度的内核融合或有限的操作调度，限制了异构训练环境中的性能优化。

本文介绍了 Centauri，这是一个创新框架，其中包含全面的通信分区和用于优化重叠的分层调度方案。我们提出了一个包含三个固有抽象维度的分区空间：基元替换、拓扑感知组分区和工作负载分区。这些维度共同创造了高效重叠的综合优化空间。为了确定通信和计算算子的有效重叠，我们将混合并行训练中的调度任务分解为三个层次：操作、层和模型。通过这些技术，Centauri 有效地重叠了通信延迟并提高了硬件利用率。评估结果表明，Centauri 在各种并行训练配置中比流行方法实现了高达 1.49 倍的加速。

items.title: AERO: Adaptive Erase Operation for Improving Lifetime and Performance of Modern NAND Flash-Based SSDs.
items.abstract: This work investigates a new erase scheme in NAND flash memory to improve the lifetime and performance of modern solid-state drives (SSDs). In NAND flash memory, an erase operation applies a high voltage (e.g., > 20 V) to flash cells for a long time (e.g., > 3.5 ms), which degrades cell endurance and potentially delays user I/O requests. While a large body of prior work has proposed various techniques to mitigate the negative impact of erase operations, no work has yet investigated how erase latency should be set to fully exploit the potential of NAND flash memory; most existing techniques use a fixed latency for every erase operation which is set to cover the worst-case operating conditions. To address this, we propose Aero (Adaptive ERase Operation), a new erase scheme that dynamically adjusts erase latency to be just long enough for reliably erasing target cells, depending on the cells' current erase characteristics. Aero accurately predicts such near-optimal erase latency based on the number of fail bits during an erase operation. To maximize its benefits, we further optimize Aero in two aspects. First, at the beginning of an erase operation, Aero attempts to erase the cells for a short time (e.g., 1 ms), which enables Aero to always obtain the number of fail bits necessary to accurately predict the near-optimal erase latency. Second, Aero aggressively yet safely reduces erase latency by leveraging a large reliability margin present in modern SSDs. We demonstrate the feasibility and reliability of Aero using 160 real 3D NAND flash chips, showing that it enhances SSD lifetime over the conventional erase scheme by 43% without change to existing NAND flash chips. Our system-level evaluation using eleven real-world workloads shows that an AERO-enabled SSD reduces read tail latency by 34% on average over a state-of-the-art technique.
items.abstract_zh: 这项工作研究了 NAND 闪存中的新擦除方案，以提高现代固态硬盘 (SSD) 的使用寿命和性能。在 NAND 闪存中，擦除操作会长时间（例如，> 3.5 ms）向闪存单元施加高电压（例如，> 20 V），这会降低单元耐用性并可能延迟用户 I/O 请求。虽然大量先前的工作提出了各种技术来减轻擦除操作的负面影响，但尚未有工作研究如何设置擦除延迟以充分发挥 NAND 闪存的潜力；大多数现有技术对每个擦除操作都使用固定的延迟，该延迟被设置为覆盖最坏情况的操作条件。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 Aero（自适应擦除操作），这是一种新的擦除方案，可以根据单元的当前擦除特性动态调整擦除延迟，使其足够长以可靠地擦除目标单元。 Aero 根据擦除操作期间的失败位数量准确预测这种接近最佳的擦除延迟。为了最大化其效益，我们在两个方面进一步优化Aero。首先，在擦除操作开始时，Aero 尝试在短时间内（例如 1 ms）擦除单元，这使得 Aero 始终能够获得准确预测接近最佳擦除延迟所需的失败位数量。其次，Aero 通过利用现代 SSD 中存在的巨大可靠性裕度，积极而安全地减少擦除延迟。我们使用 160 个真实 3D NAND 闪存芯片演示了 Aero 的可行性和可靠性，表明它在不改变现有 NAND 闪存芯片的情况下，比传统擦除方案将 SSD 寿命提高了 43%。我们使用 11 个实际工作负载进行的系统级评估表明，与最先进的技术相比，支持 AERO 的 SSD 平均将读尾延迟减少了 34%。

items.title: Harnessing the Power of Specialization for Sustainable Computing.
items.abstract:
Computing is critical to address some of the most pressing needs of humanity today, including climate change mitigation and adaptation. However, it is also the source of a significant and steadily increasing carbon toll, attributed in part to the exponential growth in energy-demanding workloads, such as artificial intelligence (AI). Due to the demise of Dennard scaling, we can no longer count on exponentially-improve energy efficiency of general-purpose processors. Therefore, today's operational efficiency gains rely on specialized hardware.

In this talk I will discuss the promise and the perils of harnessing specialization on the road to sustainable computing.
items.abstract_zh:
计算对于解决当今人类最紧迫的一些需求至关重要，包括减缓和适应气候变化。然而，它也是碳排放量显着且稳定增加的根源，部分原因是人工智能 (AI) 等能源需求工作负载呈指数级增长。由于登纳德缩放的消亡，我们不能再指望通用处理器的能源效率呈指数级提高。因此，当今运营效率的提高依赖于专用硬件。

在本次演讲中，我将讨论在可持续计算之路上利用专业化的前景和风险。

items.title: DTC-SpMM: Bridging the Gap in Accelerating General Sparse Matrix Multiplication with Tensor Cores.
items.abstract: Sparse Matrix-Matrix Multiplication (SpMM) is a building-block operation in scientific computing and machine learning applications. Recent advancements in hardware, notably Tensor Cores (TCs), have created promising opportunities for accelerating SpMM. However, harnessing these hardware accelerators to speed up general SpMM necessitates considerable effort. In this paper, we undertake a comprehensive analysis of the state-of-the-art techniques for accelerating TC-based SpMM and identify crucial performance gaps. Drawing upon these insights, we propose DTC-SpMM, a novel approach with systematic optimizations tailored for accelerating general SpMM on TCs. DTC-SpMM encapsulates diverse aspects, including efficient compression formats, reordering methods, and runtime pipeline optimizations. Our extensive experiments on modern GPUs with a diverse range of benchmark matrices demonstrate remarkable performance improvements in SpMM acceleration by TCs in conjunction with our proposed optimizations. The case study also shows that DTC-SpMM speeds up end-to-end GNN training by up to 1.91× against popular GNN frameworks.
items.abstract_zh: 稀疏矩阵-矩阵乘法 (SpMM) 是科学计算和机器学习应用中的构建块运算。硬件方面的最新进展，特别是 Tensor Core (TC)，为加速 SpMM 创造了有希望的机会。然而，利用这些硬件加速器来加速通用 SpMM 需要付出相当大的努力。在本文中，我们对加速基于 TC 的 SpMM 的最先进技术进行了全面分析，并确定了关键的性能差距。根据这些见解，我们提出了 DTC-SpMM，这是一种具有系统优化的新颖方法，专为加速 TC 上的通用 SpMM 而定制。 DTC-SpMM 封装了多个方面，包括高效的压缩格式、重新排序方法和运行时管道优化。我们在具有各种基准矩阵的现代 GPU 上进行的广泛实验表明，TC 结合我们提出的优化，在 SpMM 加速方面取得了显着的性能改进。案例研究还表明，与流行的 GNN 框架相比，DTC-SpMM 将端到端 GNN 训练速度提高了 1.91 倍。

items.title: C4CAM: A Compiler for CAM-based In-memory Accelerators.
items.abstract: Machine learning and data analytics applications increasingly suffer from the high latency and energy consumption of conventional von Neumann architectures. Recently, several in-memory and near-memory systems have been proposed to overcome this von Neumann bottleneck. Platforms based on content-addressable memories (CAMs) are particularly interesting due to their efficient support for the search-based operations that form the foundation for many applications, including K-nearest neighbors (KNN), high-dimensional computing (HDC), recommender systems, and one-shot learning among others. Today, these platforms are designed by hand and can only be programmed with low-level code, accessible only to hardware experts. In this paper, we introduce C4CAM, the first compiler framework to quickly explore CAM configurations and seamlessly generate code from high-level Torch-Script code. C4CAM employs a hierarchy of abstractions that progressively lowers programs, allowing code transformations at the most suitable abstraction level. Depending on the type and technology, CAM arrays exhibit varying latencies and power profiles. Our framework allows analyzing the impact of such differences in terms of system-level performance and energy consumption, and thus supports designers in selecting appropriate designs for a given application.
items.abstract_zh: 机器学习和数据分析应用程序越来越受到传统冯诺依曼架构的高延迟和能耗的影响。最近，已经提出了几种内存中和近内存系统来克服这个冯诺依曼瓶颈。基于内容可寻址存储器 (CAM) 的平台特别有趣，因为它们有效支持基于搜索的操作，这些操作构成了许多应用的基础，包括 K 最近邻 (KNN)、高维计算 (HDC)、推荐系统和一次性学习等。如今，这些平台都是手工设计的，只能使用低级代码进行编程，只有硬件专家才能访问。在本文中，我们介绍 C4CAM，这是第一个快速探索 CAM 配置并从高级 Torch-Script 代码无缝生成代码的编译器框架。 C4CAM 采用逐步降低程序的抽象层次结构，允许在最合适的抽象级别进行代码转换。根据类型和技术的不同，CAM 阵列表现出不同的延迟和功率分布。我们的框架允许分析此类差异对系统级性能和能耗的影响，从而支持设计人员为给定应用选择适当的设计。

items.title: BeeZip: Towards An Organized and Scalable Architecture for Data Compression.
items.abstract:
Data compression plays a critical role in operating systems and large-scale computing workloads. Its primary objective is to reduce network bandwidth consumption and memory/storage capacity utilization. Given the need to manipulate hash tables, and execute matching operations on extensive data volumes, data compression software has transformed into a resource-intensive CPU task. To tackle this challenge, numerous prior studies have introduced hardware acceleration methods. For example, they have utilized Content-Addressable Memory (CAM) for string matches, incorporated redundant historical copies for each matching component, and so on. While these methods amplify the compression throughput, they often compromise an essential aspect of compression performance: the compression ratio (C.R.). Moreover, hardware accelerators face significant resource costs, especially in memory, when dealing with new large sliding window algorithms.

We introduce BeeZip, the first hardware acceleration system designed explicitly for compression with a large sliding window. BeeZip tackles the hardware-level challenge of optimizing both compression ratio and throughput. BeeZip offers architectural support for compression algorithms with the following distinctive attributes: 1) A two-stage compression algorithm adapted for accelerator parallelism, decoupling hash parallelism and match execution dependencies; 2) An organized hash hardware accelerator named BeeHash engine enhanced with dynamic scheduling, which orchestrates hash processes with structured parallelism; 3) A hardware accelerator named HiveMatch engine for the match process, which employs a new scalable parallelism approach and a heterogeneous scale processing unit design to reduce memory resource overhead.

Experimental results show that on the Silesia dataset, BeeZip achieves an optimal throughput of 10.42GB/s (C.R. 2.96) and the best C.R. of 3.14 (throughput of 5.95GB/s). Under similar compression ratios, compared to single-threaded/36-threaded software implementations, BeeZip offers accelerator speedups of 23.2×/2.45×, respectively. Against all accelerators we know, BeeZip consistently demonstrates a superior compression ratio, improving by at least 9%.
items.abstract_zh:
数据压缩在操作系统和大规模计算工作负载中起着至关重要的作用。其主要目标是减少网络带宽消耗和内存/存储容量利用率。由于需要操作哈希表并在大量数据上执行匹配操作，数据压缩软件已转变为资源密集型 CPU 任务。为了应对这一挑战，许多先前的研究引入了硬件加速方法。例如，他们利用内容可寻址内存（CAM）进行字符串匹配，为每个匹配组件合并冗余历史副本，等等。虽然这些方法放大了压缩吞吐量，但它们通常会损害压缩性能的一个重要方面：压缩比 (C.R.)。此外，在处理新的大型滑动窗口算法时，硬件加速器面临着巨大的资源成本，特别是在内存方面。

我们推出 BeeZip，这是第一个专门为大滑动窗口压缩而设计的硬件加速系统。 BeeZip 解决了优化压缩比和吞吐量的硬件级挑战。 BeeZip 为压缩算法提供架构支持，具有以下独特属性： 1）适用于加速器并行性、解耦哈希并行性和匹配执行依赖性的两级压缩算法； 2）一个有组织的哈希硬件加速器，称为BeeHash引擎，增强了动态调度，它以结构化并行性编排哈希过程； 3）用于匹配过程的名为HiveMatch引擎的硬件加速器，它采用新的可扩展并行方法和异构规模处理单元设计来减少内存资源开销。

实验结果表明，在Silesia数据集上，BeeZip的最佳吞吐量为10.42GB/s（C.R. 2.96），最佳C.R.为3.14（吞吐量为5.95GB/s）。在相似的压缩比下，与单线程/36线程软件实现相比，BeeZip 的加速比分别为 23.2×/2.45×。与我们所知的所有加速器相比，BeeZip 始终表现出卓越的压缩比，提高了至少 9%。

items.title: TinyForge: A Design Space Exploration to Advance Energy and Silicon Area Trade-offs in tinyML Compute Architectures with Custom Latch Arrays.
items.abstract: The proliferation of smart IoT devices has given rise to tinyML, which deploys deep neural networks on resource-constrained systems, benefitting from custom hardware that optimizes for low silicon area and high energy efficiency amidst tinyML's characteristic small model sizes (50-500 KB) and low target frequencies (1-100 MHz). We introduce a novel custom latch array integrated with a compute memory fabric, achieving 8 μm 2 /B density and 11 fJ/B read energy, surpassing synthesized implementations by 7x in density and 5x in read energy. This advancement enables dataflows that do not require activation buffers, reducing memory overheads. By optimizing systolic vs. combinational scaling in a 2D compute array and using bit-serial instead of bit-parallel compute, we achieve a reduction of 4.8x in area and 2.3x in multiply-accumulate energy. To study the advantages of the proposed architecture and its performance at the system level, we architect tinyForge, a design space exploration to obtain Pareto-optimal architectures and compare the trade-offs with respect to traditional approaches. tinyForge comprises (1) a parameterized template for memory hierarchies and compute fabric, (2) estimations of power, area, and latency for hardware components, (3) a dataflow optimizer for efficient workload scheduling, (4) a genetic algorithm performing multi-objective optimization to find Pareto-optimal architectures. We evaluate the performance of our proposed architecture on all of the MLPerf Tiny Inference Benchmark workloads, and the BERT-Tiny transformer model, demonstrating its effectiveness in lowering the energy per inference while addressing the introduced area overheads. We show the importance of storing all the weights on-chip, reducing the energy per inference by 7.5x vs. utilizing off-chip memories. Finally, we demonstrate the potential of the custom latch arrays and bit-serial digital compute arrays to reduce by up to 1.8x the energy per inference, 2.2x the latency per inference, and 3.7x the silicon area.
items.abstract_zh: 智能物联网设备的激增催生了tinyML，它在资源受限的系统上部署深度神经网络，受益于针对小硅面积和高能源效率进行优化的定制硬件，以及tinyML特有的小模型尺寸（50-500 KB）和低目标频率（1-100 MHz）。我们引入了一种与计算内存结构集成的新型定制锁存器阵列，实现了 8 μm 2 /B 密度和 11 fJ/B 读取能量，在密度和读取能量方面比合成实现高出 7 倍和 5 倍。这一进步使得数据流不需要激活缓冲区，从而减少了内存开销。通过优化 2D 计算阵列中的收缩与组合缩放，并使用位串行而不是位并行计算，我们实现了面积减少 4.8 倍，乘法累加能量减少 2.3 倍。为了研究所提出的架构的优点及其在系统级别的性能，我们设计了tinyForge，这是一种设计空间探索，旨在获得帕累托最优架构，并与传统方法进行权衡比较。 tinyForge 包含 (1) 用于内存层次结构和计算结构的参数化模板，(2) 硬件组件的功耗、面积和延迟估计，(3) 用于高效工作负载调度的数据流优化器，(4) 执行多目标优化以找到帕累托最优架构的遗传算法。我们在所有 MLPerf Tiny Inference Benchmark 工作负载和 BERT-Tiny Transformer 模型上评估了我们提出的架构的性能，证明了其在降低每次推理能耗同时解决引入的面积开销方面的有效性。我们展示了将所有权重存储在片上的重要性，与使用片外存储器相比，每次推理的能量减少了 7.5 倍。最后，我们展示了定制锁存器阵列和位串行数字计算阵列的潜力，可将每次推理的能量减少多达 1.8 倍，将每次推理的延迟减少 2.2 倍，并将硅面积减少 3.7 倍。

items.title: Fractal: Joint Multi-Level Sparse Pattern Tuning of Accuracy and Performance for DNN Pruning.
items.abstract: Model pruning, which eliminates redundant parameters and reduces computational complexity, emerges as a viable strategy for efficient deep neural network (DNN) deployment. Owing to the irregular memory access and computation patterns in the sparse DNN models after pruning, existing arts have suggested various structured sparse patterns to enhance sparse DNN performance. In this work, we propose a unique perspective of understanding existing sparse pattern design as computation-skipping after tiling the tensor computation into multi-level hierarchies. This unified perspective opens up a new design space of multi-level sparse tiling to maximize the sparsity benefits of DNNs, as opposed to the single-level choice in current practices. We present Fractal, an auto-tuning system for sparse patterns that identifies the optimal multi-level sparse tiling pattern. We introduce PatternIR, a novel high-level intermediate representation (IR), to express a diverse range of multi-level sparse patterns. By leveraging insights from prior dense operator optimizations, we translate PatternIR into low-level compiler IRs, facilitating further operator optimization and code generation. Our evaluations demonstrate that Fractal yields substantial speedups of up to on average 3.16× on CUDA Core, 2.52× on TensorCore of GPUs compared to the state-of-art dense baseline under 75% sparsity while upholding minimal accuracy degradation compared to prior sparse operator libraries.
items.abstract_zh: 模型剪枝消除了冗余参数并降低了计算复杂性，成为高效部署深度神经网络 (DNN) 的可行策略。由于稀疏DNN模型在修剪后的不规则内存访问和计算模式，现有技术提出了各种结构化稀疏模式来增强稀疏DNN性能。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种独特的视角，将现有的稀疏模式设计理解为将张量计算平铺为多级层次结构后的计算跳跃。这种统一的视角开辟了多级稀疏平铺的新设计空间，以最大限度地发挥 DNN 的稀疏性优势，而不是当前实践中的单级选择。我们提出了 Fractal，这是一种稀疏模式自动调整系统，可以识别最佳的多级稀疏平铺模式。我们引入 PatternIR，一种新颖的高级中间表示（IR），来表达各种多级稀疏模式。通过利用先前密集算子优化的见解，我们将 PatternIR 转换为低级编译器 IR，从而促进进一步的算子优化和代码生成。我们的评估表明，与 75% 稀疏度下最先进的稠密基线相比，Fractal 在 CUDA Core 上平均提高了 3.16 倍，在 GPU 的 TensorCore 上平均提高了 2.52 倍，同时与之前的稀疏算子库相比，保持了最小的精度下降。

items.title: NetRen: Service Migration-Driven Network Renascence with Synthesizing Updated Configuration.
items.abstract: Changes in enterprise networks require updated configurations. However, manual configurations with slow update efficiency, poor performance, and handling limitations, lead to the unavailability of updated networks. Therefore, we propose an efficient network renascence framework, NetRen , which synthesizes OSPF/BGP configurations driven by service and traffic migration. We follow the workflow of sketch extraction, configuration synthesis, and repair. Initially, comprehensive graphs are constructed to represent configuration sketches. We propose a GraphTrans synthesizer with Transformer's benefits of long-range focus and parallel reasoning. Training samples with the optimization relationship enable the synthesizer to achieve a mapping that optimizes performance based on configurations. To overcome the satisfiability barrier, configurations from the synthesizer are input to the stepwise configuration repairer as well-initialized solutions, achieving rapid configuration repair. Experiments demonstrate that the consistency of network configurations output by the GraphTrans synthesizer averages 98%. NetRen achieves a 312.4× increase in synthesis efficiency and a 5.83% improvement in network performance.
items.abstract_zh: 企业网络的变化需要更新配置。但手动配置更新效率慢、性能差、处理能力有限，导致更新网络不可用。因此，我们提出了一种高效的网络复兴框架 NetRen，它综合了由服务和流量迁移驱动的 OSPF/BGP 配置。我们遵循草图提取、配置合成和修复的工作流程。最初，构建综合图表来表示配置草图。我们提出了一个 GraphTrans 合成器，它具有 Transformer 的远程聚焦和并行推理的优点。具有优化关系的训练样本使合成器能够实现基于配置优化性能的映射。为了克服可满足性障碍，来自合成器的配置被输入到逐步配置修复器作为初始化良好的解决方案，实现快速配置修复。实验表明，GraphTrans合成器输出的网络配置一致性平均为98%。 NetRen实现了综合效率提升312.4倍，网络性能提升5.83%。

items.title: Going Green for Less Green: Optimizing the Cost of Reducing Cloud Carbon Emissions.
items.abstract: The continued exponential growth of cloud datacenter capacity has increased awareness of the carbon emissions when executing large compute-intensive workloads. To reduce carbon emissions, cloud users often temporally shift their batch workloads to periods with low carbon intensity. While such time shifting can increase job completion times due to their delayed execution, the cost savings from cloud purchase options, such as reserved instances, also decrease when users operate in a carbon-aware manner. This happens because carbon-aware adjustments change the demand pattern by periodically leaving resources idle, which creates a trade-off between carbon emissions and cost. In this paper, we present GAIA, a carbon-aware scheduler that enables users to address the three-way trade-off between carbon, performance, and cost in cloud-based batch schedulers. Our results quantify the carbon-performance-cost trade-off in cloud platforms and show that compared to existing carbon-aware scheduling policies, our proposed policies can double the amount of carbon savings per percentage increase in cost, while decreasing the performance overhead by 26%.
items.abstract_zh: 云数据中心容量的持续指数增长提高了人们对执行大型计算密集型工作负载时的碳排放的认识。为了减少碳排放，云用户通常会暂时将批处理工作负载转移到碳强度较低的时期。虽然这种时间转移会由于延迟执行而增加作业完成时间，但当用户以碳意识方式操作时，通过云购买选项（例如保留实例）节省的成本也会减少。发生这种情况是因为碳意识调整通过定期使资源闲置来改变需求模式，从而在碳排放和成本之间进行权衡。在本文中，我们提出了 GAIA，一种碳感知调度程序，使用户能够在基于云的批处理调度程序中解决碳、性能和成本之间的三向权衡。我们的结果量化了云平台中的碳性能成本权衡，并表明与现有的碳感知调度策略相比，我们提出的策略可以使成本每增加一个百分比而节省一倍的碳，同时将性能开销降低 26%。

items.title: NeuPIMs: NPU-PIM Heterogeneous Acceleration for Batched LLM Inferencing.
items.abstract:
Modern transformer-based Large Language Models (LLMs) are constructed with a series of decoder blocks. Each block comprises three key components: (1) QKV generation, (2) multi-head attention, and (3) feed-forward networks. In batched processing, QKV generation and feed-forward networks involve compute-intensive matrix-matrix multiplications (GEMM), while multi-head attention requires bandwidth-heavy matrix-vector multiplications (GEMV). Machine learning accelerators like TPUs or NPUs are proficient in handling GEMM but are less efficient for GEMV computations. Conversely, Processing-in-Memory (PIM) technology is tailored for efficient GEMV computation, while it lacks the computational power to handle GEMM effectively.

Inspired by this insight, we propose NeuPIMs, a heterogeneous acceleration system that jointly exploits a conventional GEMM-focused NPU and GEMV-optimized PIM devices. The main challenge in efficiently integrating NPU and PIM lies in enabling concurrent operations on both platforms, each addressing a specific kernel type. First, existing PIMs typically operate in a "blocked" mode, allowing only either NPU or PIM to be active at any given time. Second, the inherent dependencies between GEMM and GEMV in LLMs restrict their parallel processing. To tackle these challenges, NeuPIMs is equipped with dual row buffers in each bank, facilitating the simultaneous management of memory read/write operations and PIM commands. Further, NeuPIMs employs a runtime sub-batch interleaving technique to maximize concurrent execution, leveraging batch parallelism to allow two independent sub-batches to be pipelined within a single NeuPIMs device. Our evaluation demonstrates that compared to GPU-only, NPU-only, and a naïve NPU+PIM integrated acceleration approaches, NeuPIMs achieves 3×, 2.4× and 1.6× throughput improvement, respectively.
items.abstract_zh:
现代基于 Transformer 的大型语言模型 (LLM) 由一系列解码器块构建。每个块包含三个关键组件：(1) QKV 生成、(2) 多头注意力和 (3) 前馈网络。在批量处理中，QKV 生成和前馈网络涉及计算密集型矩阵-矩阵乘法（GEMM），而多头注意力需要大量带宽的矩阵-向量乘法（GEMV）。 TPU 或 NPU 等机器学习加速器能够熟练处理 GEMM，但对于 GEMV 计算效率较低。相反，内存处理（PIM）技术是为高效的 GEMV 计算而定制的，但它缺乏有效处理 GEMM 的计算能力。

受这一见解的启发，我们提出了 NeuPIM，这是一种异构加速系统，联合利用传统的以 GEMM 为中心的 NPU 和 GEMV 优化的 PIM 设备。有效集成 NPU 和 PIM 的主要挑战在于在两个平台上实现并发操作，每个平台都处理特定的内核类型。首先，现有的 PIM 通常以“阻塞”模式运行，在任何给定时间只允许 NPU 或 PIM 处于活动状态。其次，法学硕士中GEMM和GEMV之间固有的依赖性限制了它们的并行处理。为了应对这些挑战，NeuPIM 在每个存储体中配备了双行缓冲区，有助于同时管理内存读/写操作和 PIM 命令。此外，NeuPIMs 采用运行时子批次交错技术来最大化并发执行，利用批次并行性允许两个独立的子批次在单个 NeuPIMs 设备内进行管道传输。我们的评估表明，与仅 GPU、仅 NPU 和简单的 NPU+PIM 集成加速方法相比，NeuPIM 分别实现了 3 倍、2.4 倍和 1.6 倍的吞吐量提升。

items.title: Optimal Kernel Orchestration for Tensor Programs with Korch.
items.abstract:
Kernel orchestration is the task of mapping the computation defined in different operators of a deep neural network (DNN) to the execution of GPU kernels on modern hardware platforms. Prior approaches optimize kernel orchestration by greedily applying operator fusion , which fuses the computation of multiple operators into a single kernel, and miss a variety of optimization opportunities in kernel orchestration.

This paper presents Korch, a tensor program optimizer that discovers optimal kernel orchestration strategies for tensor programs. Instead of directly fusing operators, Korch first applies operator fission to decompose tensor operators into a small set of basic tensor algebra primitives. This decomposition enables a diversity of fine-grained, inter-operator optimizations. Next, Korch optimizes kernel orchestration by formalizing it as a constrained optimization problem, leveraging an off-the-shelf binary linear programming solver to discover an optimal orchestration strategy, and generating an executable that can be directly deployed on modern GPU platforms. Evaluation on a variety of DNNs shows that Korch outperforms existing tensor program optimizers by up to 1.7× on V100 GPUs and up to 1.6× on A100 GPUs. Korch is publicly available at https://github.com/humuyan/Korch.
items.abstract_zh:
内核编排是将深度神经网络 (DNN) 的不同运算符中定义的计算映射到现代硬件平台上 GPU 内核的执行的任务。先前的方法通过贪婪地应用算子融合来优化内核编排，它将多个算子的计算融合到单个内核中，并且错过了内核编排中的各种优化机会。

本文介绍了 Korch，一种张量程序优化器，可以发现张量程序的最佳内核编排策略。 Korch 没有直接融合算子，而是首先应用算子裂变将张量算子分解为一小组基本张量代数原语。这种分解可以实现多种细粒度、操作员间的优化。接下来，Korch 通过将其形式化为约束优化问题来优化内核编排，利用现成的二进制线性规划求解器来发现最佳编排策略，并生成可直接部署在现代 GPU 平台上的可执行文件。对各种 DNN 的评估表明，Korch 在 V100 GPU 上的性能比现有张量程序优化器高出 1.7 倍，在 A100 GPU 上的性能高出 1.6 倍。 Korch 可在 https://github.com/humuyan/Korch 上公开获取。

items.title: More Apps, Faster Hot-Launch on Mobile Devices via Fore/Background-aware GC-Swap Co-design.
items.abstract: Faster app launching is crucial for the user experience on mobile devices. Apps launched from a background cached state, called hot-launching, have much better performance than apps launched from scratch. To increase the number of hot-launches, leading mobile vendors now cache more apps in the background by enabling swap. Recent work also proposed reducing the Java heap to increase the number of cached apps. However, this paper found that existing methods deteriorate app hot-launch performance while increasing the number of cached apps. To simultaneously improve the number of cached apps and hot-launch performance, this paper proposes Fleet, a foreground/background-aware GC-swap co-design framework. To enhance app-caching capacity, Fleet limits the tracing range of GC to background objects only, avoiding touching long-lifetime foreground objects. To improve hot-launch performance, Fleet identifies objects that will be accessed during the next hot-launch and uses runtime information to guide the swap scheme in the OS. In addition, Fleet aggregates small objects with similar access patterns into the same pages to improve swap efficiency. We implemented Fleet in AOSP and evaluated its performance with different types of apps. Experimental results show that Fleet achieves a 1.59× faster hot-launch time and caches 1.21× more apps than Android.
items.abstract_zh: 更快的应用程序启动对于移动设备上的用户体验至关重要。从后台缓存状态启动的应用程序（称为热启动）比从头启动的应用程序具有更好的性能。为了增加热启动的数量，领先的移动供应商现在通过启用交换在后台缓存更多应用程序。最近的工作还建议减少 Java 堆以增加缓存应用程序的数量。然而，本文发现现有方法会降低应用程序热启动性能，同时增加缓存应用程序的数量。为了同时提高缓存应用程序的数量和热启动性能，本文提出了 Fleet，一种前台/后台感知的 GC 交换协同设计框架。为了增强应用程序缓存能力，Fleet 将 GC 的跟踪范围仅限于后台对象，避免触及长生命周期的前台对象。为了提高热启动性能，Fleet 识别下一次热启动期间将访问的对象，并使用运行时信息来指导操作系统中的交换方案。此外，Fleet将具有相似访问模式的小对象聚合到相同的页面中以提高交换效率。我们在 AOSP 中实现了 Fleet，并使用不同类型的应用程序评估了其性能。实验结果表明，与 Android 相比，Fleet 的热启动时间快了 1.59 倍，缓存的应用程序多了 1.21 倍。

items.title: Enforcing C/C++ Type and Scope at Runtime for Control-Flow and Data-Flow Integrity.
items.abstract:
Control-flow hijacking and data-oriented attacks are becoming more sophisticated. These attacks, especially data-oriented attacks, can result in critical security threats, such as leaking an SSL key. Data-oriented attacks are hard to defend against with acceptable performance due to the sheer amount of data pointers present. The root cause of such attacks is using pointers in unintended ways; fundamentally, these attacks rely on abusing pointers to violate the original scope they were used in or the original types that they were declared as.

This paper proposes Scope Type Integrity (STI) , a new defense policy that enforces all pointers (both code and data pointers) to conform to the original programmer's intent, as well as Runtime Scope Type Integrity (RSTI) mechanisms to enforce STI at runtime leveraging ARM Pointer Authentication. STI gathers information about the scope, type, and permissions of pointers. This information is then leveraged by RSTI to ensure pointers are legitimately utilized at runtime. We implemented three defense mechanisms of RSTI, with varying levels of security and performance tradeoffs to showcase the versatility of RSTI. We employ these three variants on a variety of benchmarks and real-world applications for a full security and performance evaluation of these mechanisms. Our results show that they have overheads of 5.29%, 2.97%, and 11.12%, respectively.
items.abstract_zh:
控制流劫持和面向数据的攻击变得越来越复杂。这些攻击，尤其是面向数据的攻击，可能会导致严重的安全威胁，例如泄露 SSL 密钥。由于存在大量的数据指针，因此很难以可接受的性能来防御面向数据的攻击。此类攻击的根本原因是以非预期的方式使用指针；从根本上讲，这些攻击依赖于滥用指针来违反它们使用的原始范围或它们声明的原始类型。

本文提出了作用域类型完整性 (STI)，这是一种新的防御策略，强制所有指针（包括代码和数据指针）符合原始程序员的意图，以及运行时作用域类型完整性 (RSTI) 机制，以利用 ARM 指针身份验证在运行时强制执行 STI。 STI 收集有关指针的范围、类型和权限的信息。然后 RSTI 利用该信息来确保指针在运行时得到合法使用。我们实现了 RSTI 的三种防御机制，具有不同级别的安全性和性能权衡，以展示 RSTI 的多功能性。我们在各种基准测试和实际应用程序中使用这三种变体，以对这些机制进行全面的安全性和性能评估。我们的结果显示，它们的管理费用分别为 5.29%、2.97% 和 11.12%。

items.title: Limoncello: Prefetchers for Scale.
items.abstract: This paper presents Limoncello, a novel software system that dynamically configures data prefetchers for high-utilization systems. We demonstrate that in resource-constrained environments, such as large data centers, traditional methods of hardware prefetching can increase memory latency and decrease available memory bandwidth. To address this issue, Limoncello disables hardware prefetchers when memory bandwidth utilization is high, and it leverages targeted software prefetching to reduce cache misses when hardware prefetchers are disabled. Limoncello is software-centric and does not require any modifications to hardware. Our evaluation of the deployment on Google's fleet reveals that Limoncello unlocks significant performance gains for high-utilization systems: It improves application throughput by 10%, due to a 15% reduction in memory latency, while maintaining minimal change in cache miss rate for targeted library functions.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Limoncello，这是一种新颖的软件系统，可为高利用率系统动态配置数据预取器。我们证明，在资源受限的环境中，例如大型数据中心，传统的硬件预取方法会增加内存延迟并减少可用内存带宽。为了解决这个问题，Limoncello 在内存带宽利用率较高时禁用硬件预取器，并在禁用硬件预取器时利用有针对性的软件预取来减少缓存未命中。 Limoncello 以软件为中心，不需要对硬件进行任何修改。我们对 Google 车队部署的评估表明，Limoncello 为高利用率系统带来了显着的性能提升：由于内存延迟减少了 15%，它使应用程序吞吐量提高了 10%，同时保持目标库函数的缓存未命中率变化最小。

items.title: AUDIBLE: A Convolution-Based Resource Allocator for Oversubscribing Burstable Virtual Machines.
items.abstract: In an effort to increase the utilization of data center resources cloud providers have introduced a new type of virtual machine (VM) offering, called a burstable VM (BVM). Our work is the first to study the characteristics of burstable VMs (based on traces from production systems at a major cloud provider) and resource allocation approaches for BVM workloads. We propose new approaches for BVM resource allocation and use extensive simulations driven by field data to compare them with two baseline approaches used in practice. We find that traditional approaches based on using a fixed oversubscription ratio or based on the Central Limit Theorem do not work well for BVMs: They lead to either low utilization or high server capacity violation rates. Based on the lessons learned from our workload study, we develop a new approach to BVM scheduling, called Audible, using a non-parametric statistical model, which makes the approach light-weight and workload independent, and obviates the need for training machine learning models and for tuning their parameters. We show that Audible achieves high system utilization while being able to enforce stringent requirements on server capacity violations.
items.abstract_zh: 为了提高数据中心资源的利用率，云提供商引入了一种新型虚拟机 (VM) 产品，称为可突发 VM (BVM)。我们的工作是第一个研究可突发虚拟机的特征（基于主要云提供商的生产系统的跟踪）和 BVM 工作负载的资源分配方法。我们提出了 BVM 资源分配的新方法，并使用由现场数据驱动的广泛模拟来将它们与实践中使用的两种基线方法进行比较。我们发现基于使用固定超额认购率或基于中心极限定理的传统方法对于 BVM 效果不佳：它们会导致利用率低或服务器容量违规率高。根据工作负载研究的经验教训，我们开发了一种新的 BVM 调度方法，称为 Audible，使用非参数统计模型，这使得该方法轻量且与工作负载无关，并且无需训练机器学习模型和调整其参数。我们证明 Audible 实现了高系统利用率，同时能够对服务器容量违规执行严格的要求。

items.title: Accelerating Multi-Scalar Multiplication for Efficient Zero Knowledge Proofs with Multi-GPU Systems.
items.abstract: Zero-knowledge proof is a cryptographic primitive that allows for the validation of statements without disclosing any sensitive information, foundational in applications like verifiable outsourcing and digital currency. However, the extensive proof generation time limits its widespread adoption. Even with GPU acceleration, proof generation can still take minutes, with Multi-Scalar Multiplication (MSM) accounting for about 78.2% of the workload. To address this, we present DistMSM , a novel MSM algorithm tailored for distributed multi-GPU systems. At the algorithmic level, DistMSM adapts Pippenger's algorithm for multi-GPU setups, effectively identifying and addressing bottlenecks that emerge during scaling. At the GPU kernel level, DistMSM introduces an elliptic curve arithmetic kernel tailored for contemporary GPU architectures. It optimizes register pressure with two innovative techniques and leverages tensor cores for specific big integer multiplications. Compared to state-of-the-art MSM implementations, DistMSM offers an average 6.39× speedup across various elliptic curves and GPU counts. An MSM task that previously took seconds on a single GPU can now be completed in mere tens of milliseconds. It showcases the substantial potential and efficiency of distributed multi-GPU systems in ZKP acceleration.
items.abstract_zh: 零知识证明是一种加密原语，允许在不泄露任何敏感信息的情况下验证语句，是可验证外包和数字货币等应用的基础。然而，较长的证明生成时间限制了其广泛采用。即使使用 GPU 加速，证明生成仍然需要几分钟的时间，其中多标量乘法 (MSM) 约占工作负载的 78.2%。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 DistMSM，这是一种专为分布式多 GPU 系统量身定制的新型 MSM 算法。在算法层面，DistMSM 采用 Pippenger 的算法来实现多 GPU 设置，有效识别和解决扩展过程中出现的瓶颈。在GPU内核层面，DistMSM引入了专为当代GPU架构量身定制的椭圆曲线算术内核。它通过两种创新技术优化寄存器压力，并利用张量核心进行特定的大整数乘法。与最先进的 MSM 实现相比，DistMSM 在各种椭圆曲线和 GPU 数量上提供平均 6.39 倍的加速。以前在单个 GPU 上需要几秒钟的 MSM 任务现在只需几十毫秒即可完成。它展示了分布式多 GPU 系统在 ZKP 加速方面的巨大潜力和效率。

items.title: PATHFINDER: Practical Real-Time Learning for Data Prefetching.
items.abstract:
Data prefetching is vital in high-performance processors and a large body of research has introduced a number of different approaches for accurate prefetching: stride detection, address correlating prefetchers, delta pattern detection, irregular pattern detection, etc. Most recently, a few works have leveraged advances in machine learning and deep neural networks to design prefetchers. These neural-inspired prefetchers observe data access patterns and develop a trained model that can then make accurate predictions for future accesses. A significant impediment to the success of these prefetchers is their high implementation cost, for both inference and training. These models cannot be trained in real-time, i.e., they have to be trained beforehand with a large benchmark suite. This results in a large model (that increases the overhead for inference), and the model can only successfully predict patterns that are similar to patterns in the training set.

In this work, we explore the potential of using spiking neural networks to learn and predict data access patterns, and specifically address deltas. While prior work has leaned on the recent success of trained artificial neural networks, we hypothesize that spiking neural networks are a better fit for real-time data prefetching. Spiking neural networks rely on the STDP algorithm to learn while performing inference - it is a low-cost and local learning algorithm that can quickly observe and react to the current stream of accesses. It is therefore possible to achieve high accuracy on previously unseen access patterns with a relatively small spiking neural network. This paper makes the case that spiking neurons and STDP offer a complexity-effective approach to leverage machine learning for data prefetching. We show that the proposed Pathfinder prefetcher is competitive with other state-of-the-art prefetchers on a range of benchmarks. Pathfinder can be implemented at 0.5 W and an area footprint of only 0.23 mm 2 (12 nm technology). This work shows that neural-inspired prefetching can be both practical and capable of high performance, but more innovations in SNN/STDP prefetch algorithms are required to fully maximize their potential.
items.abstract_zh:
数据预取在高性能处理器中至关重要，大量研究引入了许多不同的精确预取方法：跨步检测、地址相关预取器、增量模式检测、不规则模式检测等。最近，一些工作利用机器学习和深度神经网络的进步来设计预取器。这些受神经启发的预取器观察数据访问模式并开发经过训练的模型，然后可以对未来的访问做出准确的预测。这些预取器成功的一个重大障碍是它们的推理和训练实施成本很高。这些模型无法实时训练，即必须预先使用大型基准套件进行训练。这会导致模型变大（增加推理开销），并且模型只能成功预测与训练集中的模式相似的模式。

在这项工作中，我们探索使用尖峰神经网络来学习和预测数据访问模式的潜力，特别是解决增量问题。虽然之前的工作依赖于训练有素的人工神经网络最近的成功，但我们假设尖峰神经网络更适合实时数据预取。尖峰神经网络依靠 STDP 算法在执行推理的同时进行学习 - 它是一种低成本的本地学习算法，可以快速观察当前的访问流并做出反应。因此，可以使用相对较小的尖峰神经网络来实现以前未见过的访问模式的高精度。本文证明尖峰神经元和 STDP 提供了一种复杂有效的方法来利用机器学习进行数据预取。我们表明，所提出的 Pathfinder 预取器在一系列基准测试中与其他最先进的预取器相比具有竞争力。 Pathfinder 的功耗为 0.5 W，占地面积仅为 0.23 mm 2 （12 nm 技术）。这项工作表明，受神经启发的预取既实用又具有高性能，但需要在 SNN/STDP 预取算法方面进行更多创新，以充分发挥其潜力。

items.title: Pythia: Compiler-Guided Defense Against Non-Control Data Attacks.
items.abstract:
Modern C/C++ applications are susceptible to Non-Control Data Attacks , where an adversary attempts to exploit memory corruption vulnerabilities for security breaches such as privilege escalation, control-flow manipulation, etc. One such popular class of non-control data attacks is Control-flow Bending , where the attacker manipulates the program data to flip branch outcomes, and divert the program control flow into alternative paths to gain privileges. Unfortunately, despite tremendous advancements in software security, state-of-art defense mechanisms such as Control-flow Integrity (CFI), are ineffective against control-flow bending attacks especially those involving flipping of branch predicates.

In this work, we propose a performance-aware defensive scheme , Pythia , which utilizes ARM's pointer authentication (PA) hardware support for dynamic integrity checking of forward slices of vulnerable program variables that can be affected by input channels, and backward slices of branch variables (including pointers) that may be misused by the attacker. We first show that a naive scheme of protecting all vulnerabilities can suffer from an average runtime overhead of 47.88%. We then demonstrate how overheads can be minimized by selectively adding ARM PA-based canaries for statically-allocated program variables and creating secure sections for dynamically-allocated variables to avoid overflows by input channels. Our experiments show that employing this hybrid approach results in an average overhead to 13.07 %. We empirically show that Pythia offers better security than state-of-the-art data flow integrity (DFI) technique, especially in pointer-intensive code and C++ applications with 92% branches secured on an average and 100 % secured in case of 3 applications.
items.abstract_zh:
现代 C/C++ 应用程序很容易受到非控制数据攻击，其中攻击者试图利用内存损坏漏洞来造成安全漏洞，例如特权升级、控制流操纵等。其中一种流行的非控制数据攻击是控制流弯曲，其中攻击者操纵程序数据以翻转分支结果，并将程序控制流转移到替代路径以获取特权。不幸的是，尽管软件安全性取得了巨大进步，但最先进的防御机制（例如控制流完整性（CFI））对于抵御控制流弯曲攻击（尤其是涉及分支谓词翻转的攻击）无效。

在这项工作中，我们提出了一种性能感知防御方案 Pythia，它利用 ARM 的指针身份验证 (PA) 硬件支持对可能受输入通道影响的易受攻击的程序变量的前向切片以及可能被攻击者滥用的分支变量（包括指针）的后向切片进行动态完整性检查。我们首先表明，保护所有漏洞的简单方案可能会遭受 47.88% 的平均运行时开销。然后，我们演示如何通过有选择地为静态分配的程序变量添加基于 ARM PA 的金丝雀，并为动态分配的变量创建安全部分来避免输入通道溢出，从而最大限度地减少开销。我们的实验表明，采用这种混合方法的平均开销为 13.07%。我们的经验表明，Pythia 提供了比最先进的数据流完整性 (DFI) 技术更好的安全性，特别是在指针密集型代码和 C++ 应用程序中，平均 92% 的分支得到保护，在 3 个应用程序的情况下，100% 得到保护。

items.title: NDPipe: Exploiting Near-data Processing for Scalable Inference and Continuous Training in Photo Storage.
items.abstract: This paper proposes a novel photo storage system called NDPipe, which accelerates the performance of training and inference for image data by leveraging near-data processing in photo storage servers. NDPipe distributes storage servers with inexpensive commodity GPUs in a data center and uses their collective intelligence to perform inference and training near image data. By efficiently partitioning deep neural network (DNN) models and exploiting the data parallelism of many storage servers, NDPipe can achieve high training throughput with low synchronization costs. NDPipe optimizes the near-data processing engine to maximally utilize system components in each storage server. Our results show that, given the same energy budget, NDPipe exhibits 1.39× higher inference throughput and 2.64× faster training speed than typical photo storage systems.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种名为 NDPipe 的新型照片存储系统，该系统通过利用照片存储服务器中的近数据处理来加速图像数据的训练和推理性能。 NDPipe 在数据中心中分配具有廉价商用 GPU 的存储服务器，并利用它们的集体智慧在图像数据附近执行推理和训练。通过有效地划分深度神经网络（DNN）模型并利用许多存储服务器的数据并行性，NDPipe 可以以较低的同步成本实现高训练吞吐量。 NDPipe 优化了近数据处理引擎，以最大限度地利用每个存储服务器中的系统组件。我们的结果表明，在能量预算相同的情况下，NDPipe 的推理吞吐量比典型照片存储系统高 1.39 倍，训练速度比典型照片存储系统快 2.64 倍。

items.title: TCCL: Discovering Better Communication Paths for PCIe GPU Clusters.
items.abstract: Exploiting parallelism to train deep learning models requires GPUs to cooperate through collective communication primitives. While systems like DGX, equipped with proprietary interconnects, have been extensively studied, the systems where GPUs mainly communicate through PCIe have received limited attention. This paper introduces TCCL, a collective communication library designed explicitly for such systems. TCCL has three components: a profiler for multi-transfer performance measurement, a pathfinder to discover optimal communication paths, and a modified runtime of NCCL to utilize the identified paths. The focus is on ring-based collective communication algorithms that apply to popular communication operations in deep learning, such as AllReduce and AllGather. The evaluation results of TCCL on three different PCIe-dependent GPU clusters show that TCCL outperforms (up to ×2.07) the state-of-the-art communication libraries, NCCL and MSCCL. We also evaluate TCCL with DL training workloads with various combinations of parallelism types.
items.abstract_zh: 利用并行性来训练深度学习模型需要 GPU 通过集体通信原语进行协作。虽然像 DGX 这样配备专有互连的系统已得到广泛研究，但 GPU 主要通过 PCIe 进行通信的系统受到的关注有限。本文介绍了 TCCL，一个专门为此类系统设计的集体通信库。 TCCL 具有三个组件：用于多传输性能测量的分析器、用于发现最佳通信路径的探路器以及修改后的 NCCL 运行时间以利用已识别的路径。重点是基于环的集体通信算法，适用于深度学习中流行的通信操作，例如 AllReduce 和 AllGather。 TCCL 在三个不同的 PCIe 相关 GPU 集群上的评估结果表明，TCCL 的性能优于（高达 ×2.07）最先进的通信库 NCCL 和 MSCCL。我们还通过具有各种并行类型组合的深度学习训练工作负载来评估 TCCL。

items.title: RTL-Repair: Fast Symbolic Repair of Hardware Design Code.
items.abstract: We present RTL-Repair, a semantics-based repair tool for register transfer level circuit descriptions. Compared to the previous state-of-the-art tool, RTL-Repair generates more correct repairs within seconds instead of minutes or even hours. We imagine that RTL-Repair could thus be integrated into an IDE to give developers repair suggestions promptly. Our new SMT-based one-step fault localization and repair algorithm for digital hardware designs uses optimization to generate minimal changes that a user can easily understand. A novel adaptive windowing approach allows us to avoid scalability issues by focusing the repair search on the parts of the test that matter the most. RTL-Repair provides repairs that pass their testbench for 9 out of 12 real bugs collected from open-source hardware projects. Two repairs fully match the ground truth, one partially, four more repairs change the correct expression but in a way that overfits the testbench, and only three repairs differ strongly from the ground truth.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了 RTL-Repair，一种用于寄存器传输级电路描述的基于语义的修复工具。与之前最先进的工具相比，RTL-Repair 可在几秒钟内（而不是几分钟甚至几小时）生成更正确的修复。我们认为 RTL-Repair 可以集成到 IDE 中，以便及时为开发人员提供修复建议。我们针对数字硬件设计的新型基于 SMT 的一步式故障定位和修复算法使用优化来生成用户可以轻松理解的最小更改。一种新颖的自适应窗口方法使我们能够通过将修复搜索集中在最重要的测试部分来避免可扩展性问题。 RTL-Repair 提供的修复可通过其测试平台，修复从开源硬件项目收集的 12 个真实错误中的 9 个。两次修复完全匹配真实情况，一次部分修复，另外四次修复改变了正确的表达式，但以一种过度拟合测试平台的方式，只有三个修复与真实情况有很大不同。

items.title: GSCore: Efficient Radiance Field Rendering via Architectural Support for 3D Gaussian Splatting.
items.abstract: This paper presents GSCore, a hardware acceleration unit that efficiently executes the rendering pipeline of 3D Gaussian Splatting with algorithmic optimizations. GSCore builds on the observations from an in-depth analysis of Gaussian-based radiance field rendering to enhance computational efficiency and bring the technique to wide adoption. In doing so, we present several optimization techniques, Gaussian shape-aware intersection test, hierarchical sorting, and subtile skipping, all of which are synergistically integrated with GSCore. We implement the hardware design of GSCore, synthesize it using a commercial 28nm technology, and evaluate the performance across a range of synthetic and real-world scenes with varying image resolutions. Our evaluation results show that GSCore achieves a 15.86× speedup on average over the mobile consumer GPU with a substantially smaller area and lower energy consumption.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 GSCore，这是一种硬件加速单元，可通过算法优化有效地执行 3D 高斯 Splatting 的渲染管道。 GSCore 基于对基于高斯的辐射场渲染的深入分析的观察结果，以提高计算效率并使该技术得到广泛采用。在此过程中，我们提出了几种优化技术、高斯形状感知相交测试、分层排序和小图块跳过，所有这些技术都与 GSCore 协同集成。我们实现了 GSCore 的硬件设计，使用商用 28nm 技术对其进行合成，并评估了一系列具有不同图像分辨率的合成场景和真实场景的性能。我们的评估结果表明，GSCore 比移动消费 GPU 平均加速 15.86 倍，且面积显着缩小，能耗更低。

items.title: SpecPIM: Accelerating Speculative Inference on PIM-Enabled System via Architecture-Dataflow Co-Exploration.
items.abstract:
Generative large language models' (LLMs) inference suffers from inefficiency because of the token dependency brought by autoregressive decoding. Recently, speculative inference has been proposed to alleviate this problem, which introduces small language models to generate draft tokens and adopts the original large language model to conduct verification. Although speculative inference can enhance the efficiency of the decoding procedure, we find that it presents variable resource demands due to the distinct computation patterns of the models used in speculative inference. This variability impedes the full realization of speculative inference's acceleration potential in current systems.

To tackle this problem, we propose SpecPIM to accelerate speculative inference on the PIM-enabled system. SpecPIM aims to boost the performance of speculative inference by extensively exploring the heterogeneity brought by both the algorithm and the architecture. To this end, we construct the architecture design space to satisfy each model's disparate resource demands and dedicate the dataflow design space to fully utilize the system's hardware resources. Based on the co-design space, we propose a design space exploration (DSE) framework to provide the optimal design under different target scenarios. Compared with speculative inference on GPUs and existing PIM-based LLM accelerators, SpecPIM achieves 1.52×/2.02× geomean speedup and 6.67×/2.68× geomean higher energy efficiency.
items.abstract_zh:
由于自回归解码带来的标记依赖性，生成式大语言模型（LLM）推理效率低下。最近，推测推理被提出来缓解这个问题，引入小语言模型来生成草稿令牌，并采用原始的大语言模型进行验证。尽管推测推理可以提高解码过程的效率，但我们发现，由于推测推理中使用的模型的不同计算模式，它呈现出可变的资源需求。这种可变性阻碍了当前系统中推测推理加速潜力的充分实现。

为了解决这个问题，我们提出 SpecPIM 来加速启用 PIM 的系统上的推测推理。 SpecPIM 旨在通过广泛探索算法和架构带来的异构性来提高推测推理的性能。为此，我们构建了架构设计空间来满足每个模型不同的资源需求，并专门设计数据流设计空间以充分利用系统的硬件资源。基于协同设计空间，我们提出了设计空间探索（DSE）框架，以提供不同目标场景下的最优设计。与 GPU 上的推测推理和现有基于 PIM 的 LLM 加速器相比，SpecPIM 实现了 1.52×/2.02× geomean 加速和 6.67×/2.68× geomean 更高的能源效率。

items.title: Fermihedral: On the Optimal Compilation for Fermion-to-Qubit Encoding.
